Judges4:6 Debora a roma motho a yo bitša Baraka morwa wa Abinoama wa Kedese-Nafutali, a mo rera a re: A ga ke re Morena Modimo wa Isiraele o go laetše a re: Sepela o ye thabeng ya Thabora, o ye o na le banna ba dikete tše lesome ba Banafutali le ba Basebulone!" 
Judges4:7 O re: Kua nokeng ya Kisoni ke tlo tliša Sisera molaodi wa dira tša Jabini; o tlo tla go wene a na le dikoloi tša gagwe le madira a gagwe; mme ke tlo mo gafela diatleng tša gago. 
Judges4:8 Baraka a re: Ge o ka sepela le nna, gona ke tlo ya; fela, ge o sa sepele le nna, gona nka se ke ka ya." 
Judges4:9 Debora a re: Go sepela ke tlo sepela le wena; fela, direto tše di tlogo reta tsela ye o tlogo e swara, di ka se ke tša reta wena; ka gobane Sisera, Morena o tlo mo gafela seatleng sa mosadi. Gomme Debora a tsoga a tšwa le Baraka, ba ya Kedese." 
Judges4:10 Baraka a rapa Banafutali le Basebulone, ba bokana Kedese, a rotoga ka dinao a na le ba dikete tše lesome; Debora a rotoga le yena." 
Judges4:11 Gona moo kgauswi le motse wa Kedese go be go agile Hebere Mokeni wa go tšwa go Bakeni, bana bala ba Hobaba molangwa wa Moshe, mešaša ya gagwe e le moruleng wa Tsaanaima." 
Judges4:12 Sisera a botšwa gore Baraka morwa wa Abinoama o rotogetše thabeng ya Thabora. 
Judges4:13 Sisera a kgobokanya dikoloi tša gagwe ka moka tša tshipi tše makgolo a senyane, le madira a gagwe ka moka a a bego a na le yena, a tšwa Harosethe-Gojima, a tla nokaneng ya Kisoni." 
Judges4:14 Ke mo Debora a botšitšego Baraka a re: Tsoga, lehono Morena o gafela Sisera diatleng tša gago. A ga ke re ke yena Morena a tšwilego go go eta pele! Ya ba gona Baraka a fologago thabeng ya Thabora, a latelwa ke banna ba dikete tše lesome." 
Judges4:15 Ya re ge ba ba šwahlela ka bogale bja lerumo la Baraka, Morena a raranya Sisera le dikoloi tša gagwe ka moka le madira a gagwe ka moka; Sisera a ba a tlogela koloi ya gagwe, a tšhaba ka dinao." 
Judges4:16 Baraka a rakediša makoloi ao le madira ao a a fihliša Harosethe-Gojima; makoko ka moka a Sisera a fela ka bogale bja marumo, gwa se šale le o tee." 
Judges4:17 Ga e le Sisera a tšhaba ka dinao a tla mokutwaneng wa Jaele mosadi wa Hebere Mokeni yola, gobane ba leloko Hebere Mokeni ba be ba sa lwe le Jabini kgoši ya Hatsora." 
Judges4:18 Jaele a tšwa a dumediša Sisera, a mo rera a re: Fapogela mono, Mong wa ka! Fapogela go nna; o se boife! Sisera a fapogela mokutwaneng wa gagwe; mme Jaele a mo apeša ka kobo." 
Judges4:19 Sisera a mo rera a re: Anke o nnoše meetsana gobane ke nyorilwe. Jaele a khurumola sebjana sa maswi a mo noša; a buša a mo apeša. 
Judges4:20 Sisera a mmotša a re: Ema mojako wa mokutwana; e re ge motho a etla a re: A go motho ka mo? O fetole o re: Aowa! 
Judges4:21 Bjalo Jaele mosadi wa Hebere a tšea lemapolo la mokutwana, a swara noto ka seatla sa gagwe, a hwetša Sisera a robetše boroko ka malapi, a nanya a tsena, a mo kokotela lemapolo tlhokeng, la ba la phololetša la tsena fase; ya ba go hwa." 
Judges4:22 Ya ba gona go fihlago Baraka a hlomarela Sisera; Jaele a tšwa a mo dumediša, a mo rera a re: Tlaa, ke go bontšhe monna yo o mo tsomago. Baraka a tsena, a hwetša Sisera a rapaletše fase a hwile, lemapolo le le tlhokeng ya gagwe." 
Judges4:23 Ke wona mokgwa wo Morena a Kokobeditšego Jabini kgoši ya Bakanana ka wona ge go fihla Baisiraele. 
Judges4:24 Gomme letsogo la Baisiraele la fela le thatafalela Jabini kgoši ya Bakanana ba ba ba mo fediša, yena Jabini kgoši ya Bakanana." 
Judges5:1 Mohlang woo Debora le Baraka ba reta ba re: 
Judges5:2 Lebogang Morena! Ketapele di etile pele ga Isiraele; setšhaba sa ithapa sa tla. 
Judges5:3 Hee lena magoši, kwang. Balaodi, le sekege tsebe. nna, nna, ke bina koša ya Morena. A ke leletše Morena, Modimo wa Isiraele." 
Judges5:4 Morena, mohla wola o etšwa Saire, mohla wola o gata fase la Edomo, lefase la duma, lerata la rotha, maru a rothiša meetse." 
Judges5:5 Dithaba tša tšhoga go etla Morena; ya Sinai še e tšhoga Morena Modimo wa Isiraele. 
Judges5:6 Mehleng ya Samogara morwa wa Anathe, mehleng ya Bojaele, ditsela di wetše kgwahlana, baeti ba be ba swara ka tša go rara." 
Judges5:7 Beng ba la Isiraele ba hlokega; gwa ba gwa tsoga wena Debora, wa tsoga, wena mmago Isiraele." 
Judges5:8 Mola ba rata medimo e meswa, dintwa tša lwewa kgorong, gwa hlokwa kotse le lerumo go Isiraele, go dikete tše masomemane." 
Judges5:9 Nna pelo ya ka e rata kgwadi tša Isiraele; ba go ithapa mo setšhabeng! Lebogang Morena! 
Judges5:10 Ba go tla ba nametše dipokolotšhwana, ba go dula ba aletšwe kgogwa, ba go tla ka tsela; Le opeleng!" 
Judges5:11 Selewe lentšu la ditšhego sedibeng, ba fana tša go loka ga Morena, tša go loka ga beng ba lefase ba Isiraele, tša mohla batho ba Morena ba fologela dikgorong." 
Judges5:12 Phafoga! Phafoga! Debora-wee! Phafoga! Phafoga! O hlabelele koša! Nanoga! Baraka! O thope mathopša, morwa wa Abinoama!" 
Judges5:13 Mohla woo mašalela a phalalela bakgoma; setšhaba sa Morena sa theoga wa bagale. 
Judges5:14 Baefuraimi, batsemamedu go la Amaleke, le latelwa ke Babenyamini madireng a lena; ga Makiri gwa theoga balaodi; go Sebulone gwa ba mahlotlo a balai." 
Judges5:15 Bakgomana ba Isashara ba tšwa le Debora; moetša-Isašara ke Baraka, moišwamoeleng le nao tša gagwe. Dinokaneng tša ga Rubeni gwa ba le pelaelokgolo." 
Judges5:16 O reng o šala merakeng? O be o sa theeletša di bokolla mehlapeng, dinokaneng tša ga Rubeni gwa ba le pelaelokgolo." 
Judges5:17 Gileada a šala a le mošola Jorodane. Dani o reng a šika le matshelawatle? Asere a šala a dutše botong la lewatle, a khutile mo go lego madibogo alo." 
Judges5:18 Batho ke Basebulone, ba go se šie lehu, le Banafutali ba dihlaba kua dirwaolong." 
Judges5:19 Go tlile magoši; ya ba tlhabano, go elwa magoši a Kanana, fa Thaanake, Megido nokeng, ba se rebole silifera." 
Judges5:20 Dinaledi tša godimo tša tšwa dira, tša lwa le Sisera di le mo tseleng tša tšona." 
Judges5:21 Ba tšewa ke nokana ya Kisoni, nokana ya ditlhabanong, nokana ya Kisoni. Hee pelo ya ka, gata ka maatla." 
Judges5:22 Mohla wola gwa gata dihlako tša pitsi, ka kitimešito ya bakgoma." 
Judges5:23 Rogang Merose, o rea o motseta wa Morena. Rogang, le roge beng ba motse woo, ka ge ba sa ka ba tla ba ema le Morena, ba se eme le Morena le bagale." 
Judges5:24 Moshegofatšwa go basadi ke Jaele, mogatša wa Hebere wa Mokeni, moshegofatšwa go basadi mešašeng." 
Judges5:25 O mo kgopetše meetse; a mo nea maswi. A mo gela lebese ka mokgopu wa marena. 
Judges5:26 A iša seatla, a tšea lemapolo, ka le letona a swara noto e kgolo, a tula, a pšhatlaganya hlogo ya Sisera; ya phumega a mo phutše tlhoka." 
Judges5:27 A rita a le mo naong tša gagwe, a kanama; a rita a le mo naong tša gagwe; a le fase; a rita gona moo a kaname, ya ba “swee”." 
Judges5:28 O hlola ka nthobana ya morako a tsetsela, mma go Sisera o bobola a le diphaong. Koloi ya gagwe e diega kae e sa boe? Mešito ya dipitsi tšagwe e nteteletsang?" 
Judges5:29 Bahlalefi ba bahumagadi ba fetola. Ka ge a rela a touta a re bjalo, ba re:" 
Judges5:30 A ga se gore ba sa abaganya dithebola? Monna phuti, monna phuti le ge e le tše pedi; mašela a serena a tšewa le Sisera. Ba rebotše diaparo tša mabalabala, tše botsebotse tša mabalabala di šikerwe ke mathopša." 
Judges5:31 Anthe a lobile ohle manaba a gago, Morena. Ba ba go ratago a ba etše tšatši ge le hlaba le ne maatla. Naga ya khutša masome a mane a nywaga." 
Judges6:1 Baisiraele ba boela ba dira tše di befelago Morena; Morena a ba gafela diatleng tša Bamidiani nywaga e šupago. 
Judges6:2 Baisiraele ba robja ke matsogo a Bamidiani, ba itirela mariba dithabeng, le mefoma, le dibo tša go tšhaba Bamidiani." 
Judges6:3 E be e re ge Baisiraele ba lemile, go rotoge Bamidiani le Baamaleke le Matšwabohlabela, ba ba wela godimo," 
Judges6:4 Ba ba bokanele, ba senye dikenyo tša naga go goma ka la Gasa, ba se šadišetše Baisiraele dijo, le ge e le sehuswana, goba pholo, goba pokolo." 
Judges6:5 Ka gobane ba rotoge ka mehlape ya bona, le mešaša ya bona, ba tle e le bontši boka tšie, ba na le dikamela tše di sa balwego, ba tsena naga ba e senya." 
Judges6:6 Baisiraele ba fokodišwa o šoro ke Bamidiani ka mokgwa woo, ba ba ba hlabela Morena mokgoši." 
Judges6:7 Ya re ge ba hlabetše Morena mokgoši ka baka la Bamidiani," 
Judges6:8 Morena a roma monna wa moporofeta, a tla go Baisiraele, a ba rera a re: Morena Modimo wa Isiraele o re: Ke nna ke le rotošitšego, la tšwa Egipita ke le ntšhitše ngwakong wa bohlanka." 
Judges6:9 Ka le namolela mo diatleng tša Baegipita, le mo diatleng tša bohle ba ba bego ba le beka; ke ba lelekile ge le fihla, ka le nea naga ye ya bona," 
Judges6:10 gomme ke le boditše ka re: Modimo wa lena ke nna Morena; le se ke la boifa medimo ya Baamoro, ba le dutšego nageng ya bona. Fela, le gana go kwa se ke se bolelago." 
Judges6:11 Gwa tla Morongwa wa Morena, a dula fase moruleng wa kua Ofura, e bego e le wa Joase morwa wa Abiesere; gomme Gideoni morwa wa gagwe o be a fola mabele lwaleng, gore a a tšhabiše ge go tla Bamidiani." 
Judges6:12 Ke yena a bonego Morongwa eo, a mo kwa a re: Morena o na nago, wena monna yo bogale." 
Judges6:13 Gideoni a fetola a re: Mong wa ka hle, ge Morena a na le rena, dilo tše ka moka ke ka baka lang di re Tšwelelela? E kae mehlolo yela ya gagwe yohle, ye botatawešo ba re boditšego tša yona ba re: Ke Morena e a re rotošitšego ra tla fa re etšwa Egipita? Ga e le bjalo o re lahlile; o re gafetše diatleng tša Bamidiani." 
Judges6:14 Bjale Morena a retologela go yena a re: Sepela o ne maatla ona a a gago o namolele Isiraele diatleng tša Bamidiani; ke nna ke go romago. 
Judges6:15 Gideoni a re: Awoii Mong wa ka! Ke tlo namolela Isiraele kang? Etšwe leloko lešo e le lona le lenyenyane mo go Bamanase, le nna ke le yena e monyenyane mo kgorong ya tatawešo!" 
Judges6:16 Morena a re: Ke tlo ema nago, wa tlo fenya Bamidiani bjalo ka e ke ke go fenywa monna o tee." 
Judges6:17 Gideoni a re: Ge ka kgonthe o ntebeletše ka botho, gona mpeele seka ke bone ge e le wena o bolelago le nna." 
Judges6:18 O se ke wa tloga fa, ke be ke boe ke go tlele le sebego sa ka ke se bee fa pele ga gago. Morena a fetola a re: O tlo nkhwetša fa ge o boa." 
Judges6:19 Gideoni a ya a hlaba putšanyana, a tšea bupi a dira dinkgwana tše di sa omelwago, a fakela dinama serotong, a tšhela moro moruswing, a di tliša go yena gona moo moruleng, a di bea fase." 
Judges6:20 Morongwa wa Morena a mo rera a re: Tšea dinama le dinkgwana tše, o di bee fao lwaleng, o di tšhele ka moro. Gideoni a dira ka mokgwa woo." 
Judges6:21 Morongwa wa Morena a iša lehlotlo le a bego a le swere a kgotla dinama le dinkgwana ka ntlha ya lona; ke mo go tšwelego mollo mo lwaleng wa fiša dinama le dinkgwana tšeo. Ya ba gona Morongwa a širelago mahlong a gagwe. 
Judges6:22 Ke mo Gideoni a lemogilego gore e be e le Morongwa wa Morena; a re: Joo-nnaa! Mong wa ka Morena, ke bone Morongwa wa Morena ra lebanya difahlogo!" 
Judges6:23 Morena a mo rera a re: Bea pelo! O se ke wa boifa! O ka se ke wa hwa. 
Judges6:24 Gideoni a napa a agela Morena aletare gona moo, a e rea leina la “Morena Mompeapelo”. Le bjale e sa le gona moo Ofura ga Abiesere." 
Judges6:25 Ka bjona bošego bjoo Morena a mo rera a re: Ntšha powana ya tatago, ke ra poo ya bobedi ya nywaga e šupago; O phušole aletare ya Baali ya tatago, o reme le kokwane ya medimo e lego moo." 
Judges6:26 Gomme o agele Morena Modimo wa gago aletare gona mola sehlweng sa thaba ye, o e hlophe ka mokgwa wa yona; O tle o tšee poo yela ya bobedi o direle Morena sehlabelo ka dikgong tša kokwane ya medimo, ye o tlogo e rema." 
Judges6:27 Gideoni a bitša banna ba lesome ba bahlanka ba gagwe, a dira ka mo Morena a mmoditšego ka gona; a se dire e le mosegare, ka gobane a boifa ba gabobona le batho ba motse; a dira e le bošego." 
Judges6:28 Banna ba motse ge ba tsoga ka moswana, ba bona aletare ya Baali e phušotšwe, kokwane ya medimo ya gona e remilwe; poo yela ya bobedi e hlabetšwe aletareng e agilwego moo." 
Judges6:29 Ba botšana ba re: Dilo tše di dirilwe ke mang? Ya re ba latišitše, ba tsomišitše, ba re: Taba ye e dirilwe ke Gideoni morwa wa Joase." 
Judges6:30 Banna ba motse ba botša Joase ba re: Ntšha morwa wa gago, a bolawe, ka gobane o phušotše aletare ya Baali, a rema le kokwane ya medimo ya gona moo." 
Judges6:31 Joase a bolela le bao bohle ba bego ba eme moo, a re: Afaea Baali ke wa go lwelwa ke lena, le wa go namolelwa ke bolena naa? E a ka rego ke a mo lwela, a a bolawe e sa le bosasa bjo, ka ge Baali e le modimo wa go itwela ka nnoši; ka gobane se se phušotšwego ke aletare ya gagwe." 
Judges6:32 Mohlang woo ba mo reile leina la Jerubaali, ke go re “Baali a a lwe” ka gobane go phušotšwe aletare ya gagwe." 
Judges6:33 Bamidiani ka moka le Baamaleke ba na le Matšwabohlabela ka moka, ba bokana ba sela noka, ba hloma mešaša molaleng wa Jeseriele." 
Judges6:34 Ke mo moya wa Morena o swerego Gideoni, a letša phalafala a rapa ba ga Abiesere gore ba mo phalalele." 
Judges6:35 A roma batseta ba ya go bohle ba ga Manase, le bona ba mo phalala. A roma batseta ba ya go ba ga Asere, le go ba ga Sebulone, le go ba ga Nafutali, ba rotoga ba tla go yena." 
Judges6:36 Gideoni a rapela Modimo a re: Ge o rata go namolela Isiraele ka seatla sa ka ka moo boletšego ka gona. 
Judges6:37 Gona lesa ke bee mokgopa wa boya mo seboeng; e tlo re ge phoka e ka wela mokgopeng fela, naga ka moka ya šala e omile, ke mo ke tlogo tseba gobane o tlo namolela Isiraele ka seatla sa ka ka mokgwa wo o mpoditšego ka wona." 
Judges6:38 Gomme gwa ba bjalo; a tsoga e sa le bosasa, a gamola mokgopa, moruswi wa tlala ka meetse a phoka." 
Judges6:39 Gideoni a buša a rapela Modimo a re: A nke o se mpefelelwe ge ke bolela gatee fela, ge ke sa leka gatee fela ka mokgopa wo; a mokgopa o šale o omile o nnoši, phoka e wele naga ka moka." 
Judges6:40 Modimo a na a dira bjalo bošego bjoo; mokgopa wa šala o omile; naga ka moka ya welwa ke phoka. 
Judges7:1 Jerubaali, yena Gideoni, a tsoga e sa le bošego, a na le batho bala ka moka, ba bokana sedibeng sa Harodi; mešaša ya Bamidiani e be e le molaleng ka thoko ya Leboa, e kgotla ka mmoto wa More." 
Judges7:2 Morena a bolela le Gideoni a re: Batho ba ba nago le wena ke ba bantši. Nka se ke ka gafela Bamidiani diatleng tša bonaba, gore ba se tlo lesa go tumiša nna, ba ikgantšha ba re: Re iphološitše ka maatla a rena." 
Judges7:3 Bjale hlaboša lentšu, batho ba le kwišiše, o re: Ba boi le ba ba tšhogilego a ba gome, ba rarele le dithaba tša Gileada. Ke mo go gomilego batho ba dikete tše masome a mabedi le metšo e mebedi. Gwa šala ba dikete tše lesome." 
Judges7:4 Morena a laela Gideoni a re: Batho ba e sa le ba bantši. Ba iše nokeng, ke go hlaolele ba ba tlogo sepela le wena. Yo ke tlogo re: So, wa go tlo ya le wena a a ye nago. Bohle ba ke tlogo re: Yo a se ke a ya ba se ke ba ya." 
Judges7:5 Ya re ge a ba išitše nokeng, Morena a laela Gideoni a re: Yo a kgapetšago meetse lelemeng bjalo ka mpša ge e hlaputla ka leleme, o mmee thoko; le bao ba go nwa ba khuname, o ba bee thoko." 
Judges7:6 Gomme palo ya ba go kgapetša meetse ka diatla melomong, ya ba banna ba makgolo a mararo; ba bangwe ka moka ba nwile meetse ba khuname ka matolo." 
Judges7:7 Morena a botša Gideoni a re: Ke tlo le namolela ka banna ba ba makgolo a mararo ba go kgapetša meetse molomong, ya tlo ba go gafela Bamidiani diatleng tša gago. Ba bangwe ka moka a ba boele magaeng." 
Judges7:8 Banna bao ka moka ba Baisiraele a ba lesa ba boela magaeng, a šala a na le banna bao ba makgolo a mararo; ba šala le mefago le diphalafala tša bona. Ge e le mešaša ya Bamidiani e be e le kua tlase molaleng." 
Judges7:9 Bošego bjoo Morena a rera Gideoni a re: Tsoga o fologele mešašeng; ke e gafetše diatleng tša gago. 
Judges7:10 Ge o ka boifa go ya o nnoši, gona tloga le Phura mohlanka wa gago, a fologe a na nago." 
Judges7:11 O tlo re go kua tše ba di bolelago, wa tia maatla, wa hlagela mešaša yeo. Gideoni a fologa a na le Phura mohlanka wa gagwe, ba fihla go bahlometši magomong a mešaša." 
Judges7:12 Gomme Bamidiani le Baamaleke le Matšwabohlabela ba be ba tletše molala boka tšie, dikamela tša bona e le tše di sa balwego, di kaka lešabašaba lebotong la lewatle." 
Judges7:13 Ya re ge Gideoni a fihla moo, a kwa e mongwe a laodišetša wa gabo diloro tše a di lorilego, a re: Anke o kwe se ke se lorilego! Ke lorile kgokolo ya senkgwa e kgokologela fa mešašeng ya Bamidiani, ya fihla ya kgotla mekutwana ya e uša, ya e phekgola ya ema ka hlogo, dihlwa di tsemile fase." 
Judges7:14 Wa gabo a fetola a re: Ga se se sengwe ge e se lerumo la Gideoni morwa wa Joase, monna eo wa Moisiraele. Morena o gafetše Bamidiani le mešaša ka moka diatleng tša gagwe." 
Judges7:15 Ya re ge Gideoni a kwile tša diloro tšeo le tlhathollo ya tšona, a khunama ka matolo, a boela mešašeng ya Baisiraele, a re: Tsogang! Mešaša ya Bamidiani Morena o e gafetse diatleng tša lena." 
Judges7:16 Banna bao ba makgolo a mararo a ba dira dikgao tše tharo; e mongwe le e mongwe a mo nea phalafala a e swara, le pitša e se nago selo; ba uta dirumula mo dipitšeng." 
Judges7:17 A ba laya a re: Le lebelele nna; Le dire se nna ke tlogo se dira ge re tla mo mešaša e gomago ntshe. 
Judges7:18 Ge nna ke letša phalafala, le lena ba le nago le nna, le letše diphalafala thoko tšohle tša mešaša, le goe le re: Ka Morena le ka Gideoni!" 
Judges7:19 Gideoni le banna ba lekgolo ba ba bego ba na nae, ba fihla mo go thomago mešaša e le bošego, bahlometši ba sa tšo bewa, ba napa ba letša diphalafala, ba pšhatlaganya dipitša tše ba bego ba di swere." 
Judges7:20 Gwa lla diphalafala tša dihlopha tše tharo, gwa pšhatliwa dipitša, ba swara dirumula ka la ntsogošo, le diphalafala ka le legolo go di letša, ba hlaba mokgoši ba re: Ka lerumo la Morena le la Gideoni!" 
Judges7:21 Ba realo ba eme felo ga bona ba dikaneditše mešaša thoko tšohle. Mešaša ka moka ya ba mafereka, ba tšhaba ba goa." 
Judges7:22 Banna bao ba sa letša diphalafala tše makgolo a mararo, ke ge mono mešašeng Morena a ba rarantše, ba bolayana seng sa bona ka marumo mo mešašeng ka moka. Ka moka ba tšhaba ba leba Bethe-Sita le Tserara, go fihla mahwiting a Abele-Mehola go bataganego le Tabathe." 
Judges7:23 Bjale banna ba Isiraele, ba Nafutali le ba Asere le ba Manase, ba hlabelwa mokgoši, ba rakediša Bamidiani." 
Judges7:24 Gideoni a roma banna ba ya dithabeng ka moka tša Efuraimi ba re: Ologang le yo thibela Bamidiani le ba lalele madibogong go fihla Bethe-Bara le nokeng ya Jorodane. Banna ka moka ba Efuraimi ba phalala, ba thiba difata tša go ya madibogong go fihla Bethe-Bara le nokeng ya Jorodane." 
Judges7:25 Ba swara dikgoši tše pedi tša Bamidiani, Orebe le Seebe. Orebe ba mmolaya legageng la magukubu; Seebe ba mmolaya mo lwaleng la diphiri. Ba rakediša Bamidiani; gomme hlogo ya Orebe le ya Seebe ba di tliša go Gideoni a šetše a le mošola wa noka ya Jorodane." 
Judges8:1 Banna ba Baefuraimi ba tla ba bolela le Gideoni ba re: O reng o re dira ka mokgwa wo, o sa re bitše mola o tšwela go hlabana le Bamidiani? Ba mo omanya ka kudu." 
Judges8:2 Yena a fetola a re: Nna ke dirileng se se kago etša tše lena le di dirilego? Hleng dipudutša tša Efuraimi di fetiša puno yohle ya merara ya ga Abiesere! 
Judges8:3 Dikgoši tša Bamidiani, Orebe le Seebe, Morena o di gafetše diatleng tša lena. Nna ke kgonneng se se kago lekana le seo le se dirilego? Ge a bolela mantšu a mabjalo le bona, pefelo ya bona ya kokobela." 
Judges8:4 Mola Gideoni a setše noka ya Jorodane a na le banna bala ba makgolo a mararo, ba be ba lapile ka go raka manaba." 
Judges8:5 Gideoni a kgopela banna ba Sukothe a re: Batho ba ba ba nago le nna, a nke le ba neeng mefagonyana, ka gobane ba lapile; gomme re sa hlomarela Seba le Tsalamuna dikgoši tša Midiani." 
Judges8:6 Ba bagolo ba Sukothe ba re: Afa o šetše o swere matsogo a Seba le Tsalamuna ka diatla tša gago, ge o re re nee dira tša gago magobe?" 
Judges8:7 Gideoni a re: Ruri, mohla, Morena a gafelago Seba le Tsalamuna diatleng tša ka, ke tlo tlapiriganya mebele ya lena ka meetlwa ya naga le ka mengana." 
Judges8:8 A tloga moo a rotogela Penuele; le ba ntshe a ba kgopela ka mokgwa woo; mme batho ba Penuele ba mo fetola ka mokgwa woo wa ba Sukothe. 
Judges8:9 Banna ba Penuele Gideoni a ba rera a re: Mohla ke boago ntwa e fedile, ke tlo phušola sebo se." 
Judges8:10 Seba le Tsalamuna ke ge ba le Karakoro, ba na le madira a bona, e le banna ba e ka bago dikete tše lesome le metšo e mehlano, e le ba ba šaletšego ba madira a Matšwabohlabela. Ba ba bego ba bolailwe e be e le ba dikete tše lekgolo le le nago le masome a mabedi a dikete, ge go balwa ba ba bego ba swere marumo." 
Judges8:11 Gideoni a rotoga ka tsela ya ba mehlape, a rarela Noba le Jokobea ka thoko ya bohlabela, a fenya dira tšeo, ka gobane o ba hweditše ba iketlile." 
Judges8:12 Seba le Tsalamuna ba tšhaba, a ba šala morago, a swara dikgoši tšeo tše pedi tša Bamidiani, Seba le Tsalamuna, a šwalalanya madira a bona." 
Judges8:13 Gideoni morwa wa Joase ge a boa mo ntweng a fologa ka sefata sa Herese," 
Judges8:14 A swara lesogana la ba Sukothe a le botšiša; lona la mo ngwalela maina ka moka a bakgoma ba Sukothe le a ba bagolo ba gona, maina a banna ba masome a šupago le metšo e šupago." 
Judges8:15 Ge a tla go banna ba Sukothe, a re: Seba le Tsalamuna šeba! Ke bao le nkwerilego ka baka la bona la re: Afa matsogo a Seba le a Tsalamuna a o šetše o a swere ge o re re nee batho ba ba gago ba ba lapilego magobe?" 
Judges8:16 A napa a swara ba bagolo bao ba motse, a tšea meetlwa ya naga a ba tlapiriganya, ya ba go lemolla batho ba Sukothe." 
Judges8:17 Sebo sa Penuele a se phušola, a bolaya batho ba motse." 
Judges8:18 Bjale Gideoni a bolela le Seba le Tsalamuna a re: Banna bala ba le ba bolailego kua Thabora e be e le ba babjang? Bona ba re: Ba be ba etša wena, e le dinatla wa bana ba kgoši." 
Judges8:19 Gideoni a re: Bona bala e be e le bana bešo, bana ba mme. Ka bophelo bja Morena ge le ka be le ba leseditše ba phela, nka be ke sa le bolaye." 
Judges8:20 A botša Jethere morwa wa gagwe wa ntlha a re: Tsoga, o ba bolaye. Lesogana leo la se ke la khwamola tšhoša, le boifa ka ge e sa le lesoganyana." 
Judges8:21 Seba le Tsalamuna ba re: A go tsoge wena o re bolaye, ka gobane monna o ka maatla a gagwe. Gideoni a tsoga a bolaya Seba le Tsalamuna; a tšea maseka a mo melaleng ya dikamela tša bona." 
Judges8:22 Banna ba Isiraele ba tla ba bolela le Gideoni ba re: Baa kgoši ya rena, wena le morwa wa gago, le morwa wa morwa wa gago; ka gobane o re namoletše diatleng tša Bamidiani." 
Judges8:23 Gideoni a re: Nna nka se be kgoši ya lena; le morwa wa ka a ka se be kgoši ya lena. Kgoši ya lena ke Morena. 
Judges8:24 Gideoni a ba rera a re: Ke na le se ke se kgopelago go lena: E mongwe le e mongwe a a nnee lengina le a le thopilego. Bamidiani ba be ba apara mangina a gauta ka gobane e be e le Baisimaele. 
Judges8:25 Ba re: Ona re tla go nea. Ba ala kobo; ka moka ba lahlela mangina a ba a thopilego. 
Judges8:26 Gomme theko ya mangina ao a gauta a a a kgopetšego ya ba sekele tše sekete le makgolo a šupago tša gauta, go sa balwe maseka, le difaga, le diaparo tša purapura tše di bego di aparwa ke magoši a Bamidiani, go sa balwe le dingangane tša melala ya dikamela." 
Judges8:27 Ka tšona Gideoni a dira kobo ya moperisita, a thoma modiro woo motseng wa Ofura; gomme Baisiraele ka moka ba timela ka go latela ba etla moo; ya ba moreo o tantšego Gideoni le ba leloko la gagwe." 
Judges8:28 Bamidiani bona ba loba Baisiraele, ba se sa tsoša melala; gwa fela nywaga e masome a mane go iketlilwe nageng mehleng Gideoni a sa phela." 
Judges8:29 Yena Jerubaali morwa wa Joase a ya a itulela motseng wa gagwe. 
Judges8:30 Gideoni o be a na le barwa ba masome a šupago ba ba tswetšwego ke yena, gobane o be a na le basadi ba bantši." 
Judges8:31 Mosadi e monyenyane wa gagwe, e a bego a dutše motseng wa Sikeme, le yena a mmelegela morwa, a mo rea leina la Abimeleke." 
Judges8:32 Gideoni morwa wa Joase o hwile a tšofetše o botse, a bolokwa lebitleng la Joase tatagwe motseng wa Ofura wa ga Abiesere." 
Judges8:33 Mehleng ya ge Gideoni a šetše a hwile, Baisiraele ba boela ba fapogela go tša Baali, ba ipeela “Baali wa Kgwerano” ya ba modimo wa bona." 
Judges8:34 Ke ka gobane ba be ba lebetše Morena Modimo wa bona, e a ba namoletšego diatleng tša manaba a bona a bego a ba dikologile." 
Judges8:35 Le ba leloko la Jerubaali Gideoni ga ba a ka ba ba dira gabotse, ba lebetše tše di botse tše a di diretšego Isiraele." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleke morwa wa Jerubaali o tlile motseng wa Sikeme go bomalomagwe, a bolela le bohle ba moloko wa tatago mmagwe a re:" 
Judges9:2 Botšišang banna ka moka ba Sikeme le re: Se se lego kaone ke eng? A ke go bušwa ke banna ba masome a šupago, barwa ka moka ba Jerubaali; goba ke ge le ka bušwa ke monna o tee? Gomme le tsebeng gore yo e lego wa geno ke nna." 
Judges9:3 Ke mo bana ba bommagwe ba mmoletšego go banna ka moka ba motse wa Sikema ka mantšu ao ka moka, gomme dipelo tša bona ka moka tša gomarela Abimeleke ka ge ba re, ke ngwana borena." 
Judges9:4 Ba tšea disilifera tše masome a šupago tša mo ngwakong wa Baali wa Kgwerano ba mo nea. Abimeleke a di dira tša go thwala banna ba lefela le ba lonya ya ba balata ba gagwe. 
Judges9:5 A ya motseng wa Ofura lapeng la tatagwe, a bolaya bana babo barwa ba Jerubaali, banna ba masome a šupago leswikeng letee; gwa šala Jothama morwa e monyenyane wa Jerubaali, ka gobane o be a utame." 
Judges9:6 Gomme banna ka moka ba Sikeme, le ba motse wa sebo, ba tla moruleng wa leswika lela la seeletši (Još. 24:26) wa gona moo Sikeme, ba bea Abimeleke kgoši." 
Judges9:7 Jothama a sebelwa, a tla a ema ntlheng ya thaba ya Garisima, a hlatloša lentšu a goeletša a re: Theetšang lena banna ba Sikeme! Gona Modimo le yena o tlo le kwa." 
Judges9:8 Dihlare di ile tša ya go ipeela kgoši; tša bolela le mohlware tša re: Baa kgoši ya rena! 
Judges9:9 Mohlware wa fetola wa re: A le re nka lahla makhura a ka ao ke tumišwago ke Modimo le batho ka baka la ona, ka yo phagama godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:10 Dihlare tša bolela le mogo tša re: Tlaa wene o be kgoši ya rena. 
Judges9:11 Mogo wa fetola wa re: A le re nka lahla bose bja dienywa tša ka tše di botse, ka yo phagama godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:12 Dihlare tša bolela le morara tša re: Tlaa wene o be kgoši ya rena. 
Judges9:13 Morara wa fetola wa re: A le re nka lahla mananose a ka a thabišago Modimo le batho, ka yo phagama godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:14 Ke mo dihlare ka moka di boletšego le mošwana tša re: Tlaa wene o be kgoši ya rena. 
Judges9:15 Mošwana wa fetola wa re: Ge ka kgonthe le mpea kgoši ya lena, gona tlang le holofele moriti wa ka; ge le ka gana, gona mo mošwaneng go tlo tšwa mollo wa fiša merokwana ya Libanoni." 
Judges9:16 Gomme bjale, ga le a dira ka therešo le ka bothakga ge le bea Abimeleke kgoši. Jerubaali le ba leloko la gagwe ga le a ba dira gabotse, ga le a leboga se ba le diretšego sona." 
Judges9:17 Ka gobane tate o le hlabanetše a gafile bophelo bja gagwe ka baka la lena; o le namoletše diatleng tša Bamidiani. 
Judges9:18 Lena bjale la tsogela ba leloko la tate maatla la bolaya barwa ba gagwe banna ba masome a šupago leswikeng le tee, la bea Abimeleke morwa wa molata wa gagwe, a ba kgoši ya banna ba Sikeme; la dira fao ka ge e le ngwanabo lena." 
Judges9:19 Ge lehono le dirile Jerubaali le ba leloko la gagwe ka therešo le ka go loka, gona thabišanang le Abimeleke wa lena." 
Judges9:20 Fela, ge go se bjalo, gona go Abimeleke a go tšwe mollo o fiše banna ba Sikeme le ba motse wa sebo; gomme go banna ba Sikeme le mo motseng wa sebo go tšwe mollo o fiše Abimeleke." 
Judges9:21 Jothama a realo, mme a tšhaba a thoba a tla Beera, a dula ntshe kgole le Abimeleke ngwanabo." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleke a fetša nywaga e meraro a buša Isiraele. 
Judges9:23 Modimo a roma moya o mobe wa lohlanya Abimeleke le banna ba Sikeme; banna ba Sikeme ba hlanogela Abimeleke. 
Judges9:24 Di tlile ka mokgwa wo gore go latwe bošoro bjo bo diretšwego barwa ba Jerubaali ba masome a šupago, gore molato woo wa madi o bušetšwe godimo ga Abimeleke e a ba bolailego, mola e le ngwana bobona, o bušetšwe godimo ga banna ba Sikeme ba ba mo thušitšego go bolaya bana babo." 
Judges9:25 Beng ba motse ba mmeela balaledi dithabeng, ba hlakola bohle ba ba tlago ka tsela yeo; fela, Abimeleke a sebelwa." 
Judges9:26 Mo motseng wa Sikeme go be go tlile Gaale morwa wa Ebede, a khudugetše gona a na le bana babo; gomme banna ba Sikeme ba holofela yena." 
Judges9:27 Ya re mohla ba tšwetše mašemong ka puno ya bona ya merara, ba dira monyanya wa puno, ba tsena ngwakong wa modimo wa bona, ba ja, ba nwa, ba roga Abimeleke." 
Judges9:28 Gaale morwa wa Ebede a re: Abimeleke ke mang? Gomme rena ba Sikeme re bomang? Naa ga se yena morwa wa Jerubaali? Sebule yo a ga se yena mokgoma wa gagwe? Rena a re bušweng ke ba ga Hemoro tata go Sikeme! Re reng re bušwa ke monna yo? 
Judges9:29 Ge nna nka be ke buša setšhaba se, Abimeleke yo nka be ke mo raka. A bolela Abimeleke a re: A a rape a tle!" 
Judges9:30 Sebule mokgoma wa motse ge a botšwa tše Gaale morwa wa Ebede a di boletšego, a befelwa;" 
Judges9:31 A roma motho a yo sebela Abimeleke a re: Gaale šo, o tlile fa Sikeme a na le ba gabo bona; gomme ba bile ba go ferekanyetša motse." 
Judges9:32 Bjale tsoga bošego o na le setšhaba sa gago, o ba lalele nageng." 
Judges9:33 Gomme ge go esa o tsoge o hlagele motse; gomme ge yena le banna ba ba emago nae ba go tšwela, o tlo ba dira ka mo seatla sa gago se kgonago." 
Judges9:34 Abimeleke a tsoga bošego a na le batho ba gagwe, ba khukhunela motse wa Sikeme e le dihlopha tše nne." 
Judges9:35 Gaale morwa wa Ebede ge a etšwa ka kgoro ya motse, ke ge Abimeleke a tsogile a na le batho ba gagwe ba etšwa sekhung." 
Judges9:36 Gaale ge a bona batho a rera Sebule a re: Batho šebala, ba tla ba fologa dithabeng. Sebule a re: O bona meriti ya dithaba wa re ke batho." 
Judges9:37 Gaale a fela a sa bolela a re: Šebala ke batho; ba fologa ba etšwa kua ntlhohlong; sephohla se sengwe sesela se tla ka tsela ya morula wa baloi. 
Judges9:38 Ke mo Sebule a itšego: O kae bjale molomo wola wa gago, ge o re: Abimeleke ke mang, ge go thwe re bušwa ke yena? , Seseowe gee setšhaba se o se nyaditšego. Bjale tšwaa gee o hlabane naso." 
Judges9:39 Gaale a tšwa a etile banna ba Sikeme pele, a hlabana le Abimeleke." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleke a mo hlomarela ka gobane a tšhaba; gomme ge ba boela kgorong ya motse, ke ge ba bantši ba šetše ba bolailwe." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleke a dula motseng wa Aruma; Sebule yena a raka Gaale le bana babo, ba se ke ba hlwa ba dula motseng wa Sikeme." 
Judges9:42 Ka la ka moswana, ge batho ba tšwela mašemong, Abimeleke a sebelwa." 
Judges9:43 A rapa batho ba gagwe a dira dihlopha tše tharo, a ba lalela nageng. Gomme ge a bona batho ba etšwa motseng, a ba šwahlela a ba bolaya." 
Judges9:44 Yena Abimeleke a na le sehlopha sa gagwe a kitma a ema mo pele ga kgoro ya motse, dihlopha tše dingwe tše pedi tša leba ba ba tšwetšego mašemong tša ba wela godimo tša ba fetša." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleke a lwa le motse letšatši ka moka, a ba a o thopa, a bolaya batho ba gona, a o šwalalanya, a gaša letswai go wona." 
Judges9:46 Bjale banna ka moka ba sebong sa Sikeme ge ba di kwa, ba tšhabela mo morakong wa ngwako wa Baali wa Kgwerano." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleke ge ba mmoditše gore banna ka moka ba sebong sa Sikeme ba kgobokane gona moo," 
Judges9:48 A namela thaba ya Tsalamone a na le batho ba gagwe ka moka. Abimeleke a tšea selepe, a rema lediga, a le šikara, a laya batho ba gagwe a re: Napang le dire se le bonago ke se dira!" 
Judges9:49 Batho ka moka ba rema, monna a rwala ledigalediga, ba šala Abimeleke nthago; madiga ao ba a lahlela sebong, ba a tšhuma ka mollo; batho ka moka ba sebong sa Sikeme ba hwa; e be e le ba e ka bago sekete, banna le basadi." 
Judges9:50 Abimeleke a tšwa a yo rakelela motse wa Thebetse, a o thopa." 
Judges9:51 Fela, mo gare ga motse go be go na le sebo sa morako o mogolo. Gona moo go be go tšhabetše banna ka moka ba motse, le basadi, le beng ka moka ba motse; ba tswalela kgoro, ba namela morako." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleke a batamela morako a re ke a tsena; a tla mo go lego mojako gore a tšhume mapheko ka mollo," 
Judges9:53 mosadi e mongwe a mmetša ka tšhilo, ya mo tia hlogo ya mo phuma legata." 
Judges9:54 Abimeleke a akgofa a bitša mohlanka wa go mo swarela marumo, a re: Khwamola tšhoša o mpolaye, ba se tlo re ke bolailwe ke mosadi. Mohlanka wa gagwe a mo hlaba a hwa." 
Judges9:55 Banna ba Isiraele ge ba bona Abimeleke a hwile, ba boela magaeng a bona." 
Judges9:56 Ke wona mokgwa wo Modimo a lefeditšego bošula bjo Abimeleke a bo diretšego tatagwe ge a bolaya bana babo ba masome a šupago; 
Judges9:57 ya ba go lefetša bošula bja banna ba Sikeme, bja boela dihlogong tša bona, ba welwa ke mahlolakotsi a boletšwego ke Jothama morwa wa Jerubaali." 
Judges10:1 Mehleng e tlilego ge Abimeleke a ile, gwa tsoga Thola morwa wa Pua morwa wa Dodo wa ga Isashara, a namolela Isiraele; o be a agile Samire dithabeng tša Efuraimi." 
Judges10:2 A fetša nywaga e masome a mabedi le metso e meraro a ahlolela Isiraele; a hwa a bolokwa gona moo Samire. 
Judges10:3 Ge a ile, gwa tsoga Jairi wa ga Gileada, a fetša nywaga e masome a mabedi le metšo e mebedi a ahlolela Isiraele." 
Judges10:4 O be a na le barwa ba masome a mararo ba ba bego ba namela dipokolo tše masome a mararo, ba na le metse e masome a mararo gona moo nageng ya Gileada; le bjale e sa bitšwa metsana ya Jairi." 
Judges10:5 Jairi a hwa a bolokwa lebitleng motseng wa Kamoni. 
Judges10:6 Gomme Baisiraele ba boela ba dira tše di bego di befela Morena, ba hlankela bobaali le Asiterothe le medimo ya Basiria le ya Basidoni le ya Bamoaba le ya Baamoni le ya Bafilisita, ba tlogela Morena ba se mo direle." 
Judges10:7 Ke mo Baisiraele ba tuketšwego ke bogale bja Morena, a ba lahlela diatleng tša Bafilisita le Baamoni." 
Judges10:8 Gwa fela nywaga e lesome le metšo e seswai bona bao ba hlakiša Baisiraele le ba mošola wa Jorodane nageng ya Baamoni e lego ya Gileada; ba ba tlaiša ngwaga wohle. 
Judges10:9 Baamoni ba ba ba sela noka ya Jorodane ba hlabana le Bajuda le Babenyamini le ba leloko la Efuraimi; Baisiraele ba tlaišega gagolo. 
Judges10:10 Ke mo Baisiraele ba hlabetšego Morena mokgoši, ba re: Re go senyeditše ka go tlogela wena Modimo wa rena ra hlankela Baali." 
Judges10:11 Morena a fetola a re: Naa ga se nna ke le namoletšego go Baegipita le go Baamoro le go Baamoni le go Bafilisita. 
Judges10:12 Le go Basidoni le go Baamaleke le go Bamaone, ba ba kilego ba le tlaiša mme la ntlhabela mokgoši ka le namolela diatleng tša bona?" 
Judges10:13 Gomme lena la ntlhanogela la hlankela medimo ye le ikgethetšego yona. Bjale nka se sa le namolela. 
Judges10:14 Tlogang le yo hlabela medimo yeo mokgoši, yona yeo le ikgethetšego yona; yona a e le namolele bjale ge le le mabothateng." 
Judges10:15 Baisiraele ba rapela Morena ba re: Re sentše; re dire se o ratago go re dira sona; fela, o se gane go re namolela lehono le." 
Judges10:16 Ba realo mme ba tloša medimo e šele mo go bona, ba hlankela Morena, gomme Morena a ba a hlomoga pelo ge a bona Baisiraele ba ferehlega." 
Judges10:17 Baamoni ba be ba rapile ba bokana Gileada; Baisiraele le bona ba bokana ba hloma mešasa motseng wa Mitsipa. 
Judges10:18 Gomme batho ba e bego e le ba bagolo ba Gileada ba botšana ba re: Ke mang monna e a kago thoma tlhabano le Baamoni? Yena eo e tlo ba mokgoma wa bohle ba ba agilego Gileada. 
Judges11:1 Bjale Jefeta, monna wa ga Gileada, e be e le mogale, e be e le ngwana wa mosadi wa seotswa; tatagwe e be e le Gileada." 
Judges11:2 Gomme mosadi wa yena Gileada eo, o be a mmelegetše barwa. Barwa bao ba re go gola, ba leleka Jefeta, ba re: O ka se ke wa ja bohwa le rena mo lapeng la tatawešo, ka gobane o ngwana wa mosadi o šele." 
Judges11:3 Jefeta a tšhaba bana babo, a ya a aga nageng ya Tobe, a bothegelwa ke banna ba lonya, mme ba tšwa nae ba hula." 
Judges11:4 Gwa tla mehla yeo ya ge Baamoni ba hlabana le Baisiraele. 
Judges11:5 Gomme ge Baamoni ba sa fela ba hlabana le Baisiraele, bagolo ba Gileada ba ya ba bitša Jefeta kua nageng ya Tobe." 
Judges11:6 Ba mo kgopela ba re: Tlaa o be ketapele ya rena, re hlabane le Baamoni." 
Judges11:7 Jefeta a fetola a rera ba bagolo ba Gileada a re: A ga se lena ba le ntlhoilego la nteleka lapeng la tate! Le reng ge le tlaletšwa la tla go nna? 
Judges11:8 Bagolo ba Gileada ba fetola ba re: Re tlile ka baka leo go wene, gore o sepele le rena, re yo hlabana le Baamoni, gomme wena o tle o be mokgoma wa rena, wa bohle ba ba agilego Gileada." 
Judges11:9 Jefeta a fetola a re: Ge le re ke boe, ke yo hlabana le Baamoni, gomme ge Morena a ka ba gafela nna, a ke mo ke tlogo ba mokgoma wa lena?" 
Judges11:10 Ba bagolo ba Gileada ba fetola ba re: Hlatse ya rena ke Morena; re tlo dira se o se bolelago. 
Judges11:11 Ke mo Jefeta a sepetšego le ba bagolo ba Gileada, gomme setšhaba sa mmea a ba mokgoma le moetapele. Ditaba tše ka moka tša gagwe Jefeta o di phethile a le motseng wa Mitsipa pele ga Morena." 
Judges11:12 Bjale Jefeta a roma batseta ba ya go kgoši ya Baamoni, a re: O na le taba mang le nna ge o ntšwela dira wa tla fa nageng ya ka?" 
Judges11:13 Kgoši ya Baamoni ya fetola e botša batseta ba Jefeta ya re: Baisiraele mola ba rotoga ba etšwa Egipita, ba tšere naga ya ka go tloga ka noka ya Arinoni go fihla ka noka ya Jaboko le ya Jorodane; bjale e bušetše go nna go se ne ntwa." 
Judges11:14 Jefeta a boela a roma batseta, ba ya go kgoši ya Baamoni;" 
Judges11:15 Ba fihla ba re: Jefeta o re: Ga se Baisiraele ba ba tšerego naga ya Bamoaba, le ge e le naga ya Baamoni." 
Judges11:16 Hleng mola Baisiraele ba rotoga ba etšwa Egipita ba tšwile ka šokeng ba tla Lewatleng la mahlaka, ba tla Kadese," 
Judges11:17 ba roma batseta ba ya go kgoši ya Edomo ba re: Anke re lese re phatše naga ya gago ka bogare. Kgoši ya Edomo ya gana. Ba roma batšeta ba ya go kgoši ya Moaba; le yona ya gana. Ke moka Baisiraele ba dula Kadese," 
Judges11:18 Ba boela lešokeng ba dikologa naga ya Edomo, ba tla Moaba; ba šika naga ya Moaba ka thoko ya bohlabela, ba ba ba bokana mošola wa noka ya Arinoni; ba se ke ba sela mellwane ya Maoba; ka gobane Arinoni e be e le mollwane wa Moaba." 
Judges11:19 Baisiraele ba roma batseta ba ya go Sihoni kgoši ya Baamoro, kgoši ya Hesiboni, ba re: A nke o lese re phatše naga ya gago ka bogare, re fihle mo re yago." 
Judges11:20 Sihoni a se ke a holofela Baisiraele, a naga ge ba gata naga ya gagwe; a ba a rapa batho ba gagwe, ba bokana Jatsa ba tšwela Baisiraele dira." 
Judges11:21 Gomme Sihoni le batho ba gagwe, Morena Modimo wa Isiraele o ba gafetše diatleng tša Isiraele ka moka ga bona. Ke mo Baisiraele ba tšerego naga ye ka moka ye Baamoro ba bego ba agile go yona." 
Judges11:22 Ba tšea naga ka moka ye ya Baamoro go tloga ka noka ya Arinoni go fihla ka ya Jaboko, go tloga ka lešoka, go fihla ka noka ya Jorodane." 
Judges11:23 Ke tšona tšeo. Morena Modimo wa Isiraele o rakile Baamoro ge go tla setšhaba sa gagwe sa Isiraele. Bjale wena o rata go ba amoga naga ye. 
Judges11:24 Aga a ke re wena o tlo tšea naga ye o tlogo e fiwa ke Kamosi modimo wa gago? Gomme rena re tšere naga ya Morena Modimo wa rena a re filego yona ge re fihla. 
Judges11:25 A o itshema go phala Balaka morwa wa Tsiporo kgoši yela ya Moaba? A yena o kile a sekišana le Isiraele a lwa le rena? 
Judges11:26 Bjale ge go šetše go fetile nywaga e makgolo a mararo ya ge Baisiraele ba agile Hesiboni le metsaneng ya gona, le Aroere le metsaneng ya gona, le metseng ka moka e šikago le noka ya Arinoni, le reng le sa ka la ba amoga naga ye mehleng yeo?" 
Judges11:27 Gomme bjale ga o rumolwe ke nna; bošula bo dirwa ke wena ge o lwa le nna. Lehono gona, Baisiraele le Baamoni a ba ahlollwe ke Morena, e lego yena Moahlodi." 
Judges11:28 Kgoši ya Baamoni ya gana go kwa ditaba tše Jefeta a di rometšego go yena. 
Judges11:29 Ke mo Jefeta a tletšwego ke moya wa Morena, a phatša naga ya Gileada le ya Manase a tla motseng wa Mitsipa o lego go la Gileada; a tloga Mitsipa nageng ya Gileada a yo gahlana le Baamoni." 
Judges11:30 Gomme Jefeta a enela Morena keno a re: Ge Baamoni o ka ba gafela diatleng tša ka," 
Judges11:31 Gona mohla ke boago ke etšwa go Baamoni ntwa ge e fedile, ke tlo ntšha se ke tlogo gahlana naso se etšwa ka mojako wa ntlo ya ka, ka se dira sehlabelo." 
Judges11:32 Gomme Jefeta a tšwela Baamoni dira a hlabana le bona, mme Morena a ba gafela diatleng tša gagwe." 
Judges11:33 A ba fenya go tloga Aroere go fihla Minithe, metse e masome a mabedi, le go iša Abele-Keramima, ya ba polao e kgolo ka kudu. Ya ba moo Baamoni ba lobilego Baisiraele." 
Judges11:34 Ya re ge Jefeta a tla Mitsipa mo ngwakong wa gagwe, a tšhoga ge a gahlanetšwa ke morwedi wa gagwe a swere moropa a letša mokgolokwane; gomme mosetsana eo e be e le ngwana wa gagwe a nnoši, a se na morwa goba morwedi o mongwe." 
Judges11:35 A re go mmona a gagola diaparo tša gagwe, a re: Aowii! Ngwanaka! O nthobaganya bjang? Ke ba baka lang ke nyamišwa ke wene? Gobane ke enetše Morena, gomme nka se kgone go hlanoša." 
Judges11:36 Ngwananyana a re: Tata, ge o enetše Morena, gona ntire se o se boletšego; hleng Morena o a otlile, manaba a gago a Baamoni." 
Judges11:37 A buša a re: Se ke se kgopelago ke se setee fela: Mphe sebaka sa dikgwedi tše pedi, ke tšwe ke ye dithabeng ke llele bokgarebe bja ka, ke na le bagwera ba ka ba basetsana." 
Judges11:38 Jefeta a re: A ke o sepele hle! A mo nea dikgwedi tše pedi, a ya le dithaka tša gagwe tša basetsana, a llela bokgarebe bja gagwe a le dithabeng." 
Judges11:39 Ge go fetile dikgwedi tše pedi a boela go tatagwe, gomme tatagwe a mo dira ka mo a ennego ka gona, mme mosetsana yo ga a tseba monna. Gomme go Isiraele gwa ba le mokgwa wo," 
Judges11:40 Wa gore ka ngwaga o mongwe le o mongwe basetsana ba Isiraele ba ya ba fetša matšatši a mane ba tlotla morwedi wa Jefeta monna wa ga Gileada. 
Judges12:1 Gomme banna ba Efuraimi ba rapša, ba tšwa ba leba thoko ya leboa, ba tla ba rera Jefeta ba re: Ke ka baka lang ge o sa ka wa re bitša mola o tswela go hlabana le Baamoni gore re tšwe nago? Re tlo go tšhumelela ngwakong." 
Judges12:2 Jefeta a fetola a re: Nna le setšhaba sa gešo re be re na le tšhitang e kgolo le Baamoni; ka le hlabela mokgoši, la gana go re namolela diatleng tša bona," 
Judges12:3 Ya re ge go lena ke hlokile monamoledi, nna ka lahla bophelo bja ka, ka tšwa ka lwa le Baamoni; mme Morena a ba gafela diatleng tša ka. Bjale le reng le ntšwela dira?" 
Judges12:4 Gomme Jefeta a rapa banna ka moka ba Gileada, ba hlabana le Baefuraimi. Gomme banna ba Gileada ba bolaya Baefuraimi ba re: Le batšhabi ba ga Efuraimi! La Gileada le ka gare ga la Baefuraimi le la Bamanase." 
Judges12:5 Gomme Bagileada ba be ba thibile madibogo a noka ya Jorodane, ba a amoga Baefuraimi. Ya re ge go fihla mophonyokgi wa ga Efuraimi a re ke a sela, banna ba ga Gileada ba mmotšiše ba re: A o wa ga Efuraimi, mme ge a re: Aowa," 
Judges12:6 Ba tsebo re: Anke o re “šibolethe”. Ge a šitwa go bolela gabotse, a re “sibolethe”, gona ba mo swara ba mmolaya gona moo madibogong a Jorodane. Mehleng yeo go bolailwe Baefuraimi ba dikete tše masome a mane le metšo e mebedi." 
Judges12:7 Jefeta o feditše nywaga e selelago a ahlolela Isiraele. Gomme Jefeta monna wa Gileada a hwa, o bolokwa lebitleng mo motseng o mongwe wa metse ya Gileada." 
Judges12:8 Ge a šetše a ile, Baisiraele ba ahlolelwa ke Epsane wa Betlehema." 
Judges12:9 Yena o be a na le barwa ba masome a mararo, le barwedi ba masome a mararo ba a ba tšeišitšego. Barwa ba gagwe a ba tšeela basadi ba masome a mararo. O feditše nywaga e šupago a ahlolela Isiraele." 
Judges12:10 Epsane o hwile a bolokwa lebitleng motseng wa Betlehema. 
Judges12:11 Ge a ile, Baisiraele ba ahlolelwa ke Elone wa ga Sebulone. Yena o feditše nywaga e lesome a ahlolela Isiraele." 
Judges12:12 Elone monna wa ga Sebulone a hwa, mme ba mmoloka motseng wa Ajaloni, mo nageng ya Sebulone." 
Judges12:13 Ge a ile, Baisiraele ba ahlolelwa ke Abedoni morwa wa Hillele wa Pirathoni." 
Judges12:14 Yena o be a na le barwa ba masome a mane, le barwa ba bona ba masome a mararo. Bona bao ba be ba namela dipokolo tše masome a šupago. Yena o feditše nywaga e seswai a ahlolela Isiraele." 
Judges12:15 Gomme Abedoni morwa wa Hillele monna wa ga Pirathoni a hwa a bolokwa motseng wa Pirathoni nageng ya Efuraimi, dithabeng tša Amaleke." 
Judges13:1 Baisiraele ga ba ka ba lesa go dira tše di befetšego Morena; Morena a ba gafela diatleng tša Bafilisita nywaga e masome a mane. 
Judges13:2 Mehleng yeo go be go na le monna e mongwe wa Tsorea wa leloko la Dani; leina la gagwe e be e le Manoa; mosadi wa gagwe e be e le moopa a sa belege. 
Judges13:3 Mosadi yo o kile a bona Morongwa wa Morena, a kwa ge a re: O be o le moopa o sa belege; bjale o tlo ithwala wa belega ngwana wa mošemanyana." 
Judges13:4 Itote gee gore o se nwe morara le ge e le sedila, gomme o se je se e lego seila." 
Judges13:5 Gomme o tsebe, ge o tlo ithwala wa belega ngwana wa mošemanyana, hlogo ya gagwe e se ke ya batamelwa ka legare; ka gobane lesoganyana leo, ge le sa tšo belegwa, e tlo ba mokgethwa wa Modimo; gomme ke yena e a tlogo thoma go namolela Isiraele diatleng tša Bafilisita." 
Judges13:6 Mosadi a ya a botša monna wa gagwe a re: Go nna go be go tlile monna wa Modimo; sebopego sa gagwe e be e le sa Morongwa wa Modimo a tšhabega gagolo, ka ba ka se ke ka mmotšiša mo a tšwago; le leina la gagwe ga a ka a mpotša." 
Judges13:7 Tše a mpoditšego tšona šedi: O itše: O tlo ithwala wa belega ngwana wa mošemanyana; bjale o se ke wa nwa morara le ge e le sedila; gobane lesogana e tlo ba mokgethwa wa Morena a sa tšo belegwa le go fihla lehung. 
Judges13:8 Ke mo Manoa a kgopetšego Morena a re: Hle Mongaka! A monna eo wa Modimo e o mo romilego a ke a boele a tle go rena, a re rute ka mo re swanetšego go dira lesoganyana leo le tlogo belegwa." 
Judges13:9 Gomme Modimo a kwa se Manoa a se bolelago. Morongwwa wa Modimo a boela a tla go mosadi a le mašemong, monna wa gagwe a se nae." 
Judges13:10 Mosadi a kganyela a bitša monna wa gagwe, a re: Monna yola a bego a tlile go nna maloba, šo o bonetše." 
Judges13:11 Manoa a tsoga, a šala mosadi nthago, a tla go monna eo, a re: A ke wena monna yola a boletšego le mosadi e? A re: Ke nna." 
Judges13:12 Manoa a re: Bjale ge go tlo tla se o se boletšego, lesoganyana leo mekgwa ya lona e tlo ba efe le modiro wa lona?" 
Judges13:13 Morongwa wa Morena a fetola a re: Mosadi a a ile tšohle tše ke mmoditšego tšona. 
Judges13:14 A se ke a ja tše di tšwago go morara; a se ke a nwa morara le ge e le sedila; le gona a se ke a ja seila; a hlokomele tše ke mo laetšego tšona. 
Judges13:15 Manoa a botša Morongwa wa Morena a re: A nke re go diegiše re go hlabele putšana. 
Judges13:16 Morongwa wa Morena a fetola a re: Le ge o ka ntiegiša, nka se ke ka ja dijo tša gago. Fela, ge o rata go tliša sehlabelo, gona se tlišetše Morena. A realo ka gobane Manoa o be a sa tsebe ge e le Morongwa wa Morena." 
Judges13:17 A mmotšiša a re: Leina la gago o mang gore re go leboge mohla go diregago se o se boletšego. 
Judges13:18 Morongwa wa Morena a re: O botšišetšang leina la ka, etšwe e le la matete!" 
Judges13:19 Manoa a hlaola putšanyana ya dipudi tša gagwe, le dibego tša dijo, a direla Morena sehlabelo leswikeng; gwa direga se se makatšago, Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba lebeletše." 
Judges13:20 Ka gobane ge kgabo ya mollo e takumela godimo mo aletareng, Morongwa wa Morena a rotoga ka yona kgabo yeo e tšwago aletareng. Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba re go di bona, ba khunama ba inamela fase." 
Judges13:21 Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba bona gobane Morongwa wa Morena o širogile. Ke mo Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba lemogilego gobane e be e le Morongwa wa Morena. 
Judges13:22 Manoa a bolela le mosadi a re: Ruri, re tlo hwa, ka gobane re bone Modimo." 
Judges13:23 Mosadi a fetola a re: Ge Morena a ka be a ratile go re bolaya, gona a ka be a sa ka a amogela sehlabelo le sebego diatleng tša rena; le gona a ka be a sa ka a re boneša tše ka moka a re tsebiša tše di etšago tše re di kwilego bjale." 
Judges13:24 Gomme mosadi a ba a belega ngwana wa mošemanyana a mo rea leina la Simisone; lesoganyana la gola; Morena a mo šegofatša; 
Judges13:25 moya wa Morena wa mo hlohleletša la mathomo ge ba le mešašeng ya Dani mo gare ga Tsorea le Esithaolo. 
Judges14:1 Simisone o kile a fologela Thimina, a bona mosadi e mongwe la banenyana ba Bafilisita ba gona moo Thimina." 
Judges14:2 A boa a botša tatagwe le mmagwe a re: Kua Thimina ke bone mosadi; ke ngwanenyana wa Bafilisita; ntšeišeng yena e be mosadi wa ka. 
Judges14:3 Tatagwe le mmagwe ba re: Mo go barwedi ba bana baborena le mo setšhabeng sa gešo ka moka, a ga go na mosadi, ge o yo tšea mosadi go Bafilisita ba ba sa bollago? Simisone a botša tatagwe a re: Ntšeiše yena eo; ke yena a kgahlago mahlo aka." 
Judges14:4 Tatagwe le mmagwe ba be ba sa tsebe ge taba ye e etšwa go Morena, e le ya go mo lohlanya le Bafilisita; ka gobane mehleng yeo Baisiraele ba be ba bušwa ke Bafilisita." 
Judges14:5 Gomme Simisone a fologela Thimina a na le tatagwe le mmagwe. Ya re ge a tla dirapeng tša merara tša Thimina, a gahlana le tau ya lesogana e rora e le tseleng." 
Judges14:6 A tlelwa ke moya wa Morena, a napa a e gagoganya e ke ke putšanyana, a sa swara selo diatleng tša gagwe. Gomme tatagwe le mmagwe a se ke a ba botša se a se dirilego." 
Judges14:7 Ge a fihlile Thimina a kwana le mosadi yola a bego a mo kgahla. 
Judges14:8 Gwa feta matšatši; Simisone a boela go mmeka; a fapogela go bona setoto sa tau yela; a hwetša mo marapong a yona go na le motšhitšhi wa dinose le mamapo. 
Judges14:9 A a rafa, a feta, a tšama a eja; a fihla go tatagwe le mmagwe, a ba nea ba ja; mme a se ke a ba botša ge mamapo ao a a rafile marapong a tau." 
Judges14:10 Ya re ge tatagwe a fihlile mo go bego go le mosadi yo, Simisone a dira monyanya wa lenyalo gona moo; ka gobane masogana a be a dira ka mokgwa woo." 
Judges14:11 Ge ba mmona, ba hlaola masogana a masome a mararo a go dula le yena." 
Judges14:12 Bona bao Simisone a ba rera a re: A nke ke le hlabele nyepo. Ge le ka e nyepolla mehleng yeno e šupago ya monyanya, ke tlo le nea mašela a masome a mararo, le masome a mararo a dikobo tša monyanya." 
Judges14:13 Fela, ge nyepo ya ka e ka le palela, ke mo lena le tlo go nnea mašela a masome a mararo le dikobo tše masome a mararo. Bona ba re: Hlaba nyepo ya gago." 
Judges14:14 Ke mo a itšego: Thai! Sejo se tšwa go sejato! Bose bo tšwa go yo maatla! Gwa fela matšatši a mararo ba sa paletšwe go nyapolla. 
Judges14:15 Ka tšatši la bone ba bolela le mosadi wa Simisone ba re: Otelela monna wa gago, a re hlathollele nyepo yeo. Ge o sa re nyapollele, gona wena le lapa la tatago re tlo le tšhuma ka mollo. Afa le re laleditše gore le hume ka rena?" 
Judges14:16 Mosadi wa Simisone a mo llela a re: O ntlhoile; ga o nthate; gobane o hlabetše ba gešo nyepo, wa lesa go ntlhathollela. Simisone a re: O tsebe gore le tate le mme ga kešo ka ba botša, a o re ke tlo botša wena?" 
Judges14:17 Mosadi wa gagwe a mo llela gwa ba gwa fela matšatši a monyanya; ka la go šupa, a šetše a tenegile, a mmotša tlhathollo; mosadi a yo botša ba ga boyena." 
Judges14:18 Ka lona leo la go šupa, letšatši le sešo la dikela, banna ba motse ba tla ba mo rera ba re: Se se phalago nose ka bose ke eng? Se se phalago tau ka maatla ke eng? Yena a fetola a re: Ge le ka be le sa ka la lema ka namane ya ka, le ka be le sa ka la ya ka nyepo ya ka." 
Judges14:19 A tlelwa ke moya wa Morena, a fologela Asikaloni, a bolaya banna ba masome a mararo ba gabobona; a tšea diaparo tša bona, a di nea banna bala ba go nyarola nyepo ya gagwe. A boela gae a befetšwe." 
Judges14:20 Mosadi wa Simisone a tšewa ke yo mongwe, ke lekgetle la gagwe la mohla wola wa monyanya." 
Judges15:1 Ka mohla o mongwe wa ge go bunwa mabele, Simisone a gapa putšana a tla go bona mosadi wa gagwe. Ge a re ke tsena ka ngwakong wa mosadi, a thibelwa ke tatago mosadi." 
Judges15:2 A re: Ke be ke re o mo nyaditše, ka mo neela lekgetle la gago. A ga ke re monnagwe o mo phala ka botse; a yena e be wa gago bakeng sa yola." 
Judges15:3 Simisone a re: Bjale gona Bafilisita ba se ke ba re, ntwa e thomilwe ke nna, ge ke ba dira bošula." 
Judges15:4 A ya a swara diphukubje tše makgolo a mararo, a tšea diša, a tlemaganya mosela le mosela, a hlomela seša gare ga mesela," 
Judges15:5 A tšhuma, diša tšeo a lesa diphukubje tša yo tšhuma mabele a sa lego hlakeng le a diboeng; gwa swa le dirapa tša merara le mehlware." 
Judges15:6 Bafilisita ba re: Di dirwa ke mang? Ba re: Ke Simisone mokgonyana wa ba kwa Thimina, ka gobane ba mo amogile mosadi ba mo tšeiša lekgetle la gagwe. Ka gona Bafilisita ba rotoga ba tšhuma mosadi le tatagwe ka mollo." 
Judges15:7 Simisone bjale a re: Ge le dirile ka mokgwa wo, gona nka se ke ka lesa ke sešo ka itefeletša." 
Judges15:8 A ba robaganya dikgopo le dikgwele, ya ba polao e kgolo; a tsebo fologa a yo dula leweng la Ethama." 
Judges15:9 Ke mo Bafilisita ba rotogilego ba hloma mešaša nageng ya Juda, ba bokana Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Banna ba Juda ba re: Molato ke eng ge le rotogetše mono ga gešo? Bona ba re: Re rotogetše go tlema Simisone, gore re mo dire se a re dirilego sona." 
Judges15:11 Banna ba Juda ba dikete tše tharo ba fologela leweng la lentswe la Ethama, ba bolela le Simisone ba re: A ga o tsebe gobane re bušwa ke Bafilista? Ke dilo mang tše o re direlago tšona? Yena a re: Ke ba dirile se ba ntirilego sona." 
Judges15:12 Bona ba re: Re tlile go go tlema, gore re go gafele diatleng tša Bafilisita. Simisone a re: Gona nkeneleng gore le ka se ke la mpolaya e le lena." 
Judges15:13 Bona ba re: Aowaa; re fo rata go go tlema, re go gafele diatleng tša bona; go go bolaya, aowa, re ka se ke ra go bolaya. Ba mo tlema ka thapo tše pedi tše mpsha, ba tšwa leweng ba na nae." 
Judges15:14 Ge ba fihla Lehi, Bafilisita ba tšhela legoa, ba mo gahlanetša. Ya ba gona a tlelwago ke moya wa Morena; manti a mo matsogong a gagwe a ba bjalo ka hlale tša leokodi ge di hlabotšwe ke mollo; ditlemo tša gagwe tša kumagana matsogong a gagwe." 
Judges15:15 A bona lešapo le leswa la mohlagare wa pokolo, a le topa, a bolaya banna ba sekete ka lona." 
Judges15:16 A reta a re: Ka šapo la pokolo ke šapile lešaba; ka šapo la pokolo ke bolaile sekete sa banna. 
Judges15:17 A realo a lahla lešapo la mohlagare le a bego a le swere, mme a rea felo fao leina, a re Ramathe-Lehi." 
Judges15:18 O be a swerwe ke lenyora gagolo, a rapela Morena a re: Ke wena o dirilego phološo e kgolo ye ka seatla sa mohlanka wa gago; mme bjale ke hwa ka lenyora; ke wela diatleng tša mašoboro a." 
Judges15:19 Fela Morena o be a fatotše sekgese sa gona moo Lehi; se etšwa meetse; a nwa, mme moya wa gagwe wa boela go yena, a lapologa. Felo fao a go rea leina, a re ke “Sediba sa Morereledi”; le bjale se sa le gona moo Lehi." 
Judges15:20 O feditše nywaga e masome a mabedi a ahlolela Isiraele mehla yeo ya Bafilisita. 
Judges16:1 Simisone o kile a ya Gasa; gona moo a bona mosadi wa seotswa, a tsena go yena." 
Judges16:2 Bagasa ge ba botšwa gore Simisone o tlile, ba mo teta, ba mo lalela kgorong ya motse bošego ka moka; ba lala ba itše “kgwathi” ba re: Bosasa ge go esa re tlo mmolaya." 
Judges16:3 Simisone a robala go fihla mašegogare: mašegogare a tsoga, a swara mamati a mabedi a kgoro a a kgola gotee le dijakwana le mekgoko, a di šikara a di rotošetša ntlheng ya thaba e ukametšego Heburone." 
Judges16:4 Gwa tla lebaka le lengwe, Simisone a rata mosadi e mongwe wa moeding wa Soreka, leina la gagwe e be e le Delila." 
Judges16:5 Dikgošana tša Bafilisita tša tla go yena tša re: Mo otelele a be a go botše mo go tšwago maatla a gagwe a magolo a le gore re ka mo kgona kang, gore re mo tleme, re mo kokobetše. Ke mo e mongwe le e mongwe wa rena a tlogo go nea disilifera tše sekete se se nago le lekgolo." 
Judges16:6 Delila a bolela le Simisone a re: A nke o mpotše mo go dutšego maatla a magolo a gago, le gore o ka tlengwa kang wa fenywa." 
Judges16:7 Simisone a re: Ge motho a ka ntlema ka tšhika tše di šupago tše mpsha di sešogo tša oma, gona nka fokola kaaka batho ba bangwe." 
Judges16:8 Dikgošana tša Bafilisita tša tliša ditšhika tše di šupago tše mpsha tše di sešogo tša oma, Delila a mo tlema ka tšona," 
Judges16:9 Ka mo phapošing ba mo laletše. Delila a mo rera a re: Simisone, Bafilisita ba go wela godimo! Gomme yena a kgaola ditšhika tšeo bjalo ka ge motho a kgaola hlale tša leokodi ge le tlabotšwe ke mollo; mme ba se tsebe mo go dutšego maatla a gagwe." 
Judges16:10 Delila a bolela le Simisone a re: Hleng o nkgapišitše leswiswi; o nkakeditše. Bjale a nke o mpotše se se kago go tlema. 
Judges16:11 A fetola a re: Ge nka tlengwa ka dithapo tše mpsha tše di sešogo tša dira modiro, gona nka fokola kaaka batho ba bangwe." 
Judges16:12 Ke mo Delila a tšerego dithapo tše mpsha, a mo tlema ka tšona, a napa a re: Simisone, Bafilisita ba go wela godimo! Ka mo phapošing ba be ba mo laletše; gomme yena a di kgaoganya ka matsogo a gagwe bjalo ka hlale tše tshesanyane." 
Judges16:13 Delila a bolela le Simisone a re: Go fihla bjale o nkgapišitše leswiswi wa nkaketša. Bjale mpotše se se kago go tlema. Yena a re: Ge o ka loga mephotho e šupago ya hlogo ya ka ya ba mologo o tee le thapo. 
Judges16:14 Delila a loga a di kokotela ka lemapo, a re: Simisone, Bafilisita ba go wela godimo! Simisone a phafoga borokong, a tomola lemapo ka thapo le ka mologo." 
Judges16:15 Delila a re: O reng o fela o re o a nthata, etšwe pelo ya gago e sa nthe selo? Ke gararo bjalo o nkgapiša leswiswi, o nkutela mo maatla a magolo a a gago a dutšego gona." 
Judges16:16 Gomme, ka gobane a fela a mo phegelela ka dipolelo, a mo hlokiša khutšo, a ba a mo lapiša wa go se sa rata go phela." 
Judges16:17 A ba a mmotša tše di lego pelong ya gagwe, a re: Mo hlogong ya ka ga go ešo gwa batamela legare; ka gobane ke mokgethwa wa Modimo go tloga mola ke sa tšo belegwa. Ge nka kotwa hlogo, maatla a ka a tla tloga, ka fokola kaaka batho ba bangwe." 
Judges16:18 Delila a bona gore bjale o mmoditše thopa ya gagwe ka moka. A roma lentšu a bitša dikgošana tša Bafilisita a re: Bjale tlang; o mpoditše thopa ya gagwe ka moka. Dikgošana tša Bafilisita tša tla di swere disilifera tšela ka diatla. 
Judges16:19 Delila a mo robatša difarong tša gagwe, a bitša monna e mongwe a mo ripa mephotho e šupago ya hlogo ya gagwe; ya ba gona a mo fokodišitšego; ke mo maatla a gagwe a nago a mo tlogela." 
Judges16:20 Bjale ge mosadi a re: Simisone, Bafilisita ba go wela godimo! A phafoga a re le bjale ke tlo tšwa ka phonyokga, a sa tsebe ge Morena a mo tlogetše." 
Judges16:21 Bafilisita ba mo swara, ba mo gonya mahlo, ba mo iša Gasa, ba mo tlema ka ditšhipi tše pedi tša mefiri; a hlwa a šila mabele kgolegong." 
Judges16:22 Fela, meriri ya hlogo ya gagwe ya mela, ya ba ya etša ya mola e sešo ya kotwa." 
Judges16:23 Gomme dikgošana tša Bafilisita tša kgobokanela go tliša sedimo se segolo sa Dagoni modimo wa bona, e le gore ba thabe ka gobane ba be ba re: Simisone lenaba la rena, modimo wa rena o mo gafetše diatleng tša rena." 
Judges16:24 Setšhaba ka moka ge se mmona, sa reta modimo wa bona, ka gobane se be se re: Ke modimo wa rena o gafetšego lenaba le la rena mo diatleng tša rena, lona le la go senya mašemo a rena, la go bolaya batho ba bantši ba gešo." 
Judges16:25 Ya re ge ba thabile ka mokgwa wo, ba re: A go bitšwe Simisone, a re binele koša. Ba mmitša, ba mo ntšha kgolegong, mme a ba binela koša ba mmeile gare ga dikokwane." 
Judges16:26 Simisone a botša lesogana le le bego le mo hlahla, a re: Ntese ke phopholetše dikokwane tše di thekgilego ngwako, ke tle ke itshame ka tšona." 
Judges16:27 Gomme mo ngwakong woo go be go tletše banna le basadi ba bantši; le dikgošana ka moka tša Bafilisita di be di le gona; le ka ngwakong wa godimo go be go dutše banna le basadi, e nyakile go ba dikete tše tharo tša batho, ba lebeletše ge Simisone a bina koša." 
Judges16:28 Simisone yena a rapela Morena a re: Mong wa ka Morena, a nke o nkgopole; mphe maatla bjale gatee fela. Modimo, lesa ke itefeletše go Bafilisita gatee fela ka baka la mahlo a ka a mabedi." 
Judges16:29 A swara dikokwane tše pedi tše di mo gare, tše ngwako o bego o eme ka tšona, a di notela, e nngwe ka le letona, e nngwe ka la ntšogošo," 
Judges16:30 A bolela a re: A nke ke hwe le Bafilisita! A napa a inama a kakatlela; mme ngwako ka moka wa wela dikgošana le batho ka moka ba bego ba le go wona; gomme batho ba a ba bolailego go hweng ga gagwe, ba bile ba fetiša bao a ba bolailego mehla yela a sa phela." 
Judges16:31 Mme gwa tla bana babo le ba leloko la gabo, ba rwala setopo sa gagwe; ba boa naso, ba mmoloka lebitleng la Manoa tatagwe, kua gare ga Tsorea le Esithaolo. O be a feditše nywaga e masome a mabedi a ahlolela Isiraele." 
Judges17:1 Dithabeng tša Efuraimi go kile gwa ba le monna e mongwe; leina la gagwe e be e le Mika. 
Judges17:2 Yena eo a bolela le mmagwe a re: Disilifera tšela tše sekete setee se se nago le lekgolo tše o di utsweditšwego, mme ka go kwa o rogana ka baka la tšona, tšhelete yeo e go nna; e tšerwe ke nna. Mmagwe a re: Ngwanaka, a ke o šegofatšwe ke Morena." 
Judges17:3 Ya re ge a bušetša disilifera tšeo tše sekete se se nago le lekgolo, mmagwe a re: Ge e le nna disilifera tše ke di kgethetše Morena; ke di ntšha ka baka la ngwana wa ka, gore e be tša go dira seswantšho se se betlilwego, le se se bopilwego; a di nape di boele go wena." 
Judges17:4 Bjale ge Mika a tlišitše tšhelete yeo go mmagwe, mmagwe a tšea disilifera tše makgolo a mabedi a di nea morudi. Yena a mo direla seswantšho se se betlilwego, le se se bopilwego, sa tla sa ba mo ngwakong wa Mika." 
Judges17:5 Monna eo Mika a ba le ngwako wa Modimo; a dira le kobo ya moperisita, le ditaola, mme a bea e mongwe wa barwa ba gagwe a ba moperisita wa gagwe." 
Judges17:6 Mehleng yeo go be go se kgoši mo go Isiraele; e mongwe le e mongwe o be a dira ka mo a ratago ka gona. 
Judges17:7 Bjale go be go na le lesogana la Betlehema ga Juda, e a tšwilego go ba leloko la Juda, yena e le Molefi, a diiletše moo." 
Judges17:8 Monna e o be a tlogile motseng wa Betlehema wa ga Juda a yo nyaka madiilelo; a tla dithabeng tša Efuraimi, mme a feta ka lapeng la Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika a mo rera a re: O tšwa kae? Yena a re: Ke Molefi; ke tšwa Betlehema kua go la Juda; mme ke nyaka madiilelo. 
Judges17:10 Mika a re: Dula fa ga ka, o be tate le moperisita wa ka; ke tlo go nea disilifera tše lesome, le diaparo le dijo. Molefi eo a tsena." 
Judges17:11 A dumela go dula go monna eo; gomme lesogana leo la ba bjalo ka ngwana wa gagwe. 
Judges17:12 Mika a thwala Molefi eo a mo dira moperisita wa gagwe mme a dula lapeng la Mika. 
Judges17:13 Mika a re: Bjale ke tseba gore Morena o tlo ntšhegofatša, ka gobane ke na le moperisita wa Molefi." 
Judges18:1 Mehleng yeo go be go se kgoši mo go Isiraele. Ba leloko la Dani ba be ba sa nyaka magae mo ba kago dula, ka gobane ba be ba sešo ba arolelwa naga mo gare ga ba meloko ya Isiraele." 
Judges18:2 Ba ga Dani mo dileteng tša bona ba hlaola banna ba bahlano ba ba tiilego ba Tsorea le Esithaolo, ba ba roma gore ba yo bona naga ba e hlole, ba ba laya ba re: Yang le hlole naga. Bonabao ba tla dithabeng tša Efuraini, ba tsena lapeng la Mika, ba lala ntshe." 
Judges18:3 Ba le mo lapeng la Mika, ba tseba lesogana lela ka mmolelo ge e le Molefi; ba ya go yena ba re: O tlišitšwe ke mang mono? O dirang fa? O phela bjang mo?" 
Judges18:4 A fetola a re: Mika o ntirile ka gore le ka gore; o nthwetše ka ba moperisita wa gagwe. 
Judges18:5 Bona ba re: A nke o botšiše Modimo, re tle re tsebe ge tsela ya rena ye, re e swerego bjale, ge e tlo letlega." 
Judges18:6 A fetola e le moperisita a re: Yang le rotše dipelo; tsela ya lena ye le e swerego e bulegile pele ga Morena. 
Judges18:7 Banna bao ba sepela ba tla Laisi, ba hwetša setšhaba sa ntshe se dutše se iketlile, ba se ne taba ka mokgwa wa Basidoni, ba sa belaele, ba sa hloke selo mo nageng yeo, ba dutše kgole le Basidoni, ba se na taba le batho ba bangwe." 
Judges18:8 Ba boela go bana ba bobona kua Tsorea le Esithaolo; bona ba ba botšiša ba re: Le reng? 
Judges18:9 Bona ba re: Tsogang, re ba tšwele dira; gobane re bone naga ra hwetša e le e botse ka kudu; gomme lena le sa tšwafelang go ya go e tšea?" 
Judges18:10 Ge le ya kua le tlo hwetša setšhaba se se dutšego se iketlile, naga e ahlame e namile; gomme ke yona ye Morena a e gafetšego lena, naga ye e sa hlokego selo se nyakwago lefaseng." 
Judges18:11 Ke mo go tšwilego banna ba makgolo a selelago ba leloko la Dani, ba tloga Tsorea le Esithaolo, ba itlhamile ka marumo a ntwa;" 
Judges18:12 ba rotoga ba bokana Kiryathe-Jearima nageng ya Juda. Ke ka baka leo felo fao le bjale ba sa rego ke “Mošaša wa Dani,” kua Kiryathe-Jearima ka thoko ya Bodikela." 
Judges18:13 Ba tšwa ntshe ba tla dithabeng tša Efuraimi, ba fihla lapeng la Mika." 
Judges18:14 Banna bala ba bahlano ba ba kilego ba yo hlola naga ya Laisi, ba rera banna ba bona ba re: Afa le a tseba gobane ka fa ngwakong wo go na le kobjana ya moperisita, le ditaola, le seswantšho se se betlilwego, le se se bopilwego. Bjale tsebang se le kago se dira." 
Judges18:15 Ba fapogela ntshe ba tla ngwakong wa lesogana lela la Molefi gona moo lapeng la Mika, ba dumediša." 
Judges18:16 Ge e le banna ba Dani bala ba makgolo a selelago, ba ba itlhamilego ka marumo a ntwa, ba be ba eme kua ntle ga kgoro." 
Judges18:17 Bala ba bahlano ba dihlodi tša mohla wola, bona ba tsena ka ngwakong ba tšea seswantšho se se betlilwego, le kobjana ya moperisita, le ditaola, le seswantšho se se bopilwego; ba di tšea, moperisita a eme kgorong le banna bala ba makgolo a selelago, ba ba bego ba itlhamile ka marumo a ntwa." 
Judges18:18 Ka gobane mola banna bala ba tsena ngwakong wa Mika, ba sa tšea seswantšho se se betlilwego, le kobjana, le ditaola, le seswantšho sa go bopša, moperisita, o ba rerile a re: Le hloma bjang?" 
Judges18:19 Mme bona ba ba fetotše ba re: Homola, o sware molomo ka seatla, o tlo sepela le rena wa ba tatawešo le moperisita wa rena. Ka mo o fo ba moperisita wa lapa la motho o tee; kaone ke ge o eba moperisita wa setšhaba ka moka sa leloko la Isiraele." 
Judges18:20 Ke mo moperisita eo a beilego pelo, a tšea kobjana, le ditaola, le seswantšho se se betlilwego, a tla a ema le ba madira." 
Judges18:21 Ge ba goma moo, ba wela tsela, ba etiša bana pele le basadi, le dikgomo le diphahla." 
Judges18:22 Ya re ge ba šetše ba le kgole le lapa la Mika, banna ba ba bego ba agile ga gabo Mika, ba epša ba manama le ba ga Dani, ba fihla mo go bona." 
Judges18:23 Ge ba biletša, Badani ba retologa, ba botšiša Mika ba re: O hloma bjang o epile dira?" 
Judges18:24 Yena a re: Le tšere medimo ya ka ye ke e dirilego, la tloga le moperisita wa ka. Ke sa šaletšwe ke eng? Bjale le sa re: O hloma bjang?" 
Judges18:25 Banna ba ga Dani ba re: O se ke wa hlwa o re hlodia, gore o se tlo gahlana le banna ba sebefedi wa napa wa amogwa le bophelo bja gago le bja ba geno." 
Judges18:26 Ba realo ba ga Dani, ba tšea ka tsela ya bona. Mika ge a bona ba mo feta ka maatla, a boela gae." 
Judges18:27 Bona ba tloga le tše Mika a di dirilego, ba tloga le moperisita wa gagwe. Ba fihla ba hula motse wa Laisi, wa setšhaba se bego se iketlile, se se ne taba; ba se fetša ka bogale bja marumo, ba fiša motse ka mollo." 
Judges18:28 Go be go se monamoledi, ka gobane e be e le kgole le Basidoni, gomme ba gona ba be ba sa sepelelane le batho ba bangwe. Motse wa bona o be o le moeding wa Bethe-Rehobo. Badani ba tsošitše motse woo ba dula go wona." 
Judges18:29 Ba o rea leina, ba re ke Dani, ka leina la Dani tatabo, e a tswetšwego ke Isiraele. Kgaleng leina la motse woo e be e le Laisi." 
Judges18:30 Seswantšho sela Badani ba se hlomile, gomme Jonathane morwa Gerisone morwa wa Moshe, yena le barwa ba gagwe ya ba baperisita ba leloko la Dani, gwa ba gwa tla letšatši la go thopiwa ga ba lefase leo." 
Judges18:31 Ba be ba hlomile seswantšho sela se se dirilwego ke Mika, sa dula se le gona lebakeng ka moka la ge Ngwako wa Modimo o le kua Silo." 
Judges19:1 Mehleng yeo ge go se kgoši mo go Isiraele, go be go le monna wa Molefi, e a bego a diiletše kua morago dithabeng tša Efuraimi; yena o be a tšere mosadi wa serethe wa Betlehema nageng ya Juda." 
Judges19:2 Mosadi eo a otswa, a tšhaba, a boela lapeng la gabo kua Betlehema nageng ya Juda; gwa fela dikgwedi tše nne a dutše ntshe." 
Judges19:3 Monna wa gagwe a ba a tsoga a mo latela, gore a bolele nae ka botho a mo gomiše; a ya a na le mohlankana wa gagwe le dipokolo tše pedi. Mosadi a mo iša lapeng la tatagwe; mme tatago mosadi a mmona a thaba." 
Judges19:4 Gomme mogwegadi e wa gagwe, tatago mosadi, a mo phegelela, a dula, gwa fela matšatši a mararo ba eja ba enwa, ba robala moo." 
Judges19:5 Ka tšatši la bone ba tsoga e sa le bošego gore ba wele tsela; fela, tatago mosadi a bolela le mokgonyane wa gagwe a re: Thoma go fihlola, le tsebo sepela le ngwathile bogobe." 
Judges19:6 Ba dula, ba ja ba nwa ka babedi; tatago mosadi a botša monna eo a re: A nke o se gane go lala fa le bošego bjo, mme iketle." 
Judges19:7 Gomme monna eo ge a re ke wela tsela, mogwegadi a mo phegelela a re a dule, a lale gona." 
Judges19:8 Ka la bohlano a tsoga e sa le bošego a re ke a sepela a na le mosadi le mohlankana wa gagwe. Mogwegadi a boela a re: A nke o thome go fihlola. Gomme ba diega la ba la rapama ba eja ka babedi. 
Judges19:9 Monna eo ge a re ke wela tsela a na le mosadi le mohlankana wa gagwe, mogwegadi a mo rera a re: O ko bone, letšatši le a dikela, e bile ke mantšibaa. Lalang mo; šele, le a rapama; iketle hle; le tlo tsoga le wela tsela la boela gae." 
Judges19:10 Fela, monna eo a gana go lala ntshe, a wela tsela, a sepela a na le dipokolo tše pedi tša gagwe di belešitšwe, le mosadi wa gagwe, a tla mo go lebanego le Jebusi, e lego Jerusalema." 
Judges19:11 Ge ba feta ka gona moo Jebusi, mme letšatši le šetše le dikela, mohlankana a rera mong wa gagwe a re: A nke re fapogele ka fa motseng wa ba Jebusi, re lale ntshe." 
Judges19:12 Mong wa gagwe a fetola a re: Re ka se ke ra fapogela motseng wa batho ba šele e sego Baisiraele; a re feteleng pele re yo fihla Gibea. 
Judges19:13 A buša a rera mohlanka wa gagwe a re: Tlaa, re yo fihla motseng o mongwe re yo lala Gibea goba Rama." 
Judges19:14 Ba feta, ba sepela, ba dikelelwa ge ba etla Gibea motseng wa Babenyamini." 
Judges19:15 Ba fapogela gona gore ba yo lala gona moo Gibea; ba tsena ba dula lepatlelong la motse; gomme gwa hlokwa motho wa go ba iša lapeng la gagwe gore ba robale. 
Judges19:16 Gwa ba gwa tla monna wa mokgalabje a etšwa mašemong medirong ya gagwe e le bošego. E be e le monna wa dithabeng tša Efuraimi, e a bego a diiletše gona moo Gibea; ge e le banna ba motse, bona e be e le Babenyamini." 
Judges19:17 Ya re mokgalabje a gadia a bona monna eo wa moeti e le mo lepatlelong la motse, a mmotšiša a re: O ya kae? O tšwa kae?" 
Judges19:18 Yena a re: Rena re tseleng; re tšwa kua Bethlehema nageng ya Juda; re boela gagešo kua morago ga dithaba tša Efuraimi. Ke be ke ile Bethlehema nageng ya Juda; mme bjale ke ya Ngwakong wa Morena; gomme ga go motho e a nkišago lapeng la gagwe. 
Judges19:19 Ge e le dijo tša dipokolo tša rena re na natšo, le mefago ya go ja le go nwa. Rena balata ba gago, e lego nna le mosadi yo le lesogana le, ga re hloke selo le se senyane." 
Judges19:20 Mokgalabje a re: Bea pelo! Lesa dipabalelo tšeo e be modiro wa ka; gomme o se ke wa lala fa mokgobeng. 
Judges19:21 A ba iša lapeng la gagwe; a tšhelela dipokolo dijo; a ba hlapiša maoto, ba kgona go ja le go nwa." 
Judges19:22 Ba re ba sa dutše dipelo tša bona di thabile, gwa tla banna ba motse woo, banna ba dihlola, ba dikanetša ngwako, ba itia lemati; mme mokgalabje mong wa lapa ba mo rera ba re: Ntšha monna eo a gorogetšego lapeng la gago, re mo tsebe." 
Judges19:23 Mong wa lapa a tšwela go bona a re: Aowa Bagešo! A nke le se ke la dira bobe. Monna e ge a šetše a gorogetše lapeng la ka, le ka se ke la mo dira tša bošilo tšeo." 
Judges19:24 Tsebang gore morwedi wa ka wa kgarebe, le mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe, nka le ntšhetša bona, la ba kata la ba dira ka mo le ratago; fela, monna e le ka se ke la mo dira tša bošilo tšeo." 
Judges19:25 Banna bao ba gano mo kwa monna yela a ba a tšea mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe, a mo ntšhetša go bona, gomme ba mo tseba, ba itapiša go mo senya bošego ka moka, gwa ba gwa sa. Ge mahuba a hlatloga ya ba gona ba mo lesetšago." 
Judges19:26 Ge go esa mosadi eo a tla a phuhlama mojako wa ngwako wa monna eo mong wa gagwe a gorogetšego go wona, a rapalala ntshe, letšatši la ba la hlaba." 
Judges19:27 Bjale ge mong wa gagwe a tsogile gosasa, a bula mojako a re ke tšwe ke wele tsela, a hwetša mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe a rapaletše mojako, diatla tša gagwe di le serepoding." 
Judges19:28 A mo rera a re: Tsoga re sepele! Gwa hlokwa phetolo. A mo rwala a mmeleša pokolo, a wela tsela, a tla ga gabo." 
Judges19:29 A re go fihla a tšea thipa a pomaganya mosadi eo wa gagwe a eya ka ditho, a dira diripa tše lesome le metšo e mebedi, a di romela dileteng ka moka tša Isiraele." 
Judges19:30 Gomme mang le mang a re go di bona a re: Tše bjalo ga di ešo tša ka tša dirwa tša bonwa, e sa le mola Baisiraele ba rotoga ba etšwa Egipita go fihla lehono. Akanyang taba ye, le bolele." 
Judges20:1 Gomme Baisiraele ba tšwa ka moka go tloga ka Dani go goma ka Beresaba, le ba nageng ya Gileada, ba kgobela phuthego pele ga Morena e le batee, ba tla motseng wa Mitsipa." 
Judges20:2 Gwa tsoga ba bagolo ba setšhaba ka moka, ba meloko ya Isiraele ka moka, ba tla pitšong ya setšhaba sa Modimo, e le banna ba dikete tše makgolo a mane ba ba tiilego, ba bahlabani." 
Judges20:3 Babenyamini ba kwa go thwe: Baisiraele ba rotogetše Mitsipa. Bjale Baisiraele ba re: Re botšeng se se re hloletšego bobe bjo. 
Judges20:4 Monna ela wa Molefi, mogatša wa mosadi ela e a bolailwego, a ba anegela ditaba a re: Nkile ka tla Gibea kua nageng ya Benyamini ke na le mosadi wa ka wa serethe, ka lala ntshe." 
Judges20:5 Bošego beng ba motse wa Gibea ba ntsogela, ba dikanetša ngwako ka baka la ka, ba re ba mpolaye. Gomme mosadi wa ka wa serethe ba mo katile a ba a hwa." 
Judges20:6 Ke moka ka tšea mosadi eo wa ka ka pomaganya diripa, ka di romela dileteng ka moka tša naga ya Isiraele, ka gobane ba dirile modiro wa makgapha wa bošilo mo go Isiraele." 
Judges20:7 Bjale ge le kgobokane bohle Baisiraele, sekang taba ye le kwane." 
Judges20:8 Ke mo batho ka moka ba nago ba tsoga e le batee ka la go re: Go se ke gwa ba le e a boelago gae le e a kago ya ga gabo. 
Judges20:9 Bjale taba še, ye re yago go e dira motse wa Gibea; re dira ka matengwatengwa." 
Judges20:10 Mo melokong ka moka ya Isiraele re ntšhe banna ba lesome go ba lekgolo, e be ba lekgolo go ba sekete, le ba sekete go dikete tše lesome, ba yo tšea mefago ya setšhaba. Mohla ba boago, gona motse wa Gibea wa ga Benyamini re tlo o lefetša bošilo bjoo o bo dirilego go Isiraele." 
Judges20:11 Gomme banna ka moka ba phuthegela motse woo ba kwane e le setlemo setee. 
Judges20:12 Meloko ya Isiraele ya roma batseta ba ya dileteng tšohle tša Benyamini ba re: Ke bobe bjo bo bjang bjo bo dirilwego go lena? 
Judges20:13 Bjale ntšhang banna bao ba dihlola ba Gibea, re ba bolaye, re fediše bobe mo go Isiraele. Fela Babenyamini ba bana go dira se se boletšwego ke bana babo bona ba Isiraele." 
Judges20:14 Bona Babenyamini ba rapa, ba tšwa metseng ba tla Gibea, e le gore ba tšwele Baisiraele dira." 
Judges20:15 Mohla woo ba etšwa metseng gwa balwa dikete tše masome a mabedi le metšo e selelago tša banna ba ga Benyamini, banna ba bahlabani, go sa balwe ba motse wa Gibea. Bona e be e le banna ba makgolo a šupago, banna ba ba tiilego." 
Judges20:16 Mo go batho bao ka moka go be go na le banna ba makgolo a šupago ba ba tiilego ba mampogošo, ba go betša ka diragamabje ba sa foše le bosesanyane bja moriri." 
Judges20:17 Baisiraele ka ntle ga Babenyamini ba balwa e le ba dikete tše makgolo a mane tša banna ba marumo, ka moka e le banna ba bahlabani." 
Judges20:18 Bona ba tšwa ba rotogela Bethele, ba botšiša Modimo ba re: Ke mang mo go rena e a tlo thoma ntwa le Babenyamini? Morena a re: A go thome Juda." 
Judges20:19 Ka la ka moswana Baisiraele ba tšwa, ba yo bokana ba batametše motse wa Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Baisiraele ba hlahlamologa ba re ba hlabane le Babenyamini, ba itlhopha ka dikgao ba leba motse wa Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Babenyamini ba hlaga ba etšwa motseng wa Gibea, ba bolaya banna ba Baisiraele ba dikete tše masome a mabedi le metšo e mebedi; ba ba senyetša fase mohla woo." 
Judges20:22 Baisiraele ba itiiša ba boela ba itlhopha ka dikgao felo moo e bego e lailwe ka la maabane. 
Judges20:23 Ke ge ba bangwe ba bona ba rotogetše go llela Morena la ba la dikela; ba botšiša Morena ba re: A re iše pele go hlabana le bana babo rena ba Benyamini? Morena a re: Ba tšweleng dira. 
Judges20:24 Ka la ka moso Baisiraele ba tšwela Babenyamini dira. 
Judges20:25 Le ka lona letšatši leo Babenyamini ba gahlana nabo ba etšwa Gibea, ba buša ba bolaya ba dikete tše lesome le metšo e seswai ba bahlabani ba Baisiraele, ba ba senyetša fase." 
Judges20:26 Ke mo Baisiraele ba rotogilego ka setšhaba ba tla Bethele, ba hlwa ba llela Morena, ba ikona dijo letšatši ka moka, la ba la dikela; ba tliša dihlabelo le dibego pele ga Morena." 
Judges20:27 Ba botšiša Morena, ka gobane polokelo ya kgwerano ya Modimo e be e le gona moo lebakeng leo;" 
Judges20:28 Gomme Modimo o be a hlankelwa ke Pinehase ngwana wa Eleasara morwa wa Arone mehleng yeo. Ba botšiša ba re: A re ka boela re tšwela Babenyamini dira ra hlabana le bona? Goba re ka lesa? Morena a re: Rotogang, ka gobane ka moswana ke tlo ba gafela diatleng tše lena." 
Judges20:29 Bjale Baisiraele ba teta motse wa Gibea ka banna ba ba beilwego sekhung. 
Judges20:30 Bjale Baisiraele ge ba etla la boraro go hlabana le Babenyamini, ba hlahlamologa ka mokgwa wola wa maloba ba lebile motse wa Gibea." 
Judges20:31 Babenyamini ba tšwa ba hlabana le madira ao, ba tlogelanywa le motse; ba bolaya ba bangwe ba setšhaba bjalo ka maloba ka mo mmileng o rotogelago Bethele, le mo mmileng o tšwago ka mašemong o iša Gibea; ba bolaya ba e ka bago ba masome a mararo." 
Judges20:32 Bjale Babenyamini ba re re ba fentše bjalo ka maloba; anthe Baisiraele ba be ba kwane gore ba tlo tšhaba ba ba tlogelanya le motse ba tšwela mebileng. 
Judges20:33 Banna ka moka ba Baisiraele ba tloga mo ba bego ba eme, ba yo ema kua Baali-Thamara; ya ba gona go šwahlago Baisiraele bala ba sekhung, ba tšhologa ba etšwa ka sefateng sa Geba." 
Judges20:34 Banna ba bagale ba dikete tše lesome ba ba bego ba hlaotšwe go Baisiraele ka moka, ba fihla ba lebile motse wa Gibea. Gomme tlhabano ya ba e thata; mme Babenyamini ba be ba sa tsebe ge e le go welwa ke kotsi." 
Judges20:35 Mohla woo Morena a lahla Babenyamini, ba fenywa ke Baisiraele. Baisiraele ba bolaya Babenyamini ba dikete tše masome a mabedi le metšo e mehlano, ba bahlabani ka moka ga bona." 
Judges20:36 Babenyamini ba be ba re re fentše, ka gobane Baisiraele ba boela morago e le ka ge ba holofetše bala ba sekhung ba ba bego ba laletše motse wa Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Bona bao ba hula motse wa Gibea, ba o fediša ka moka ka bogale bja marumo." 
Judges20:38 Gomme banna ba Isiraele ba be ba kwane le ba sekhu gore ge muši wa motse o tupa, e be gona ba ba tšhologelago ka bontši." 
Judges20:39 Gwa ba bjalo; ge banna ba Isiraele ba tšhaba mola Babenyamini ba šetše ba thomile go ba bolaya, ba bile ba hlabile banna ba masome a mararo, ba re re fentše bjalo ka maloba." 
Judges20:40 Ke ge muši motseng o thoma go tupa. Babenyamini ge ba retologa ba tšhoga ge ba bona mokubego wa mollo wa motse ka moka. 
Judges20:41 Ya ba gona go phekgogago Baisiraele. Banna ba Babenyamini ba welwa ke kgakanego ge ba lemoga gobane ba wetšwe ke kotsi. 
Judges20:42 Ba tšhaba ba hlomerwe ke banna ba Isiraele ba tšea ka tsela e lebago lešokeng; marumo a ba kwatiša, le ba ba bego ba rapilwe metseng e mengwe ba bolaelwa gona moo le bona." 
Judges20:43 Babenyamini ba dikwa, ba rakedišwa, ba lelekwa ge ba re re a khutša, ba gatakelwa ba fularetše motse wa Gibea ba lebile bohlabela." 
Judges20:44 Gwa bolawa banna ba dikete tše lesome le metšo e seswai ba Babenyamini; ka moka e be e le banna ba bagale. 
Judges20:45 Ba bangwe ba phekgoga ba tšhabela šokeng, lentsweng la Rimoni; mo tseleng gwa šala go fofotšwa matopa a bona a dikete tše tlhano. Ba hlomarwa go fihla Gideoma, gwa bolawa banna ba dikete tše pedi."
